avelino/awesome-go

Programming Languages  23 hours ago  89.4k
A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Yesterday

Continuous Integration

  • gotestfmtstars327 - go test output for humans.

    • Oct 11th

    Goroutines

  • go-actorstars14 - A tiny library for writing concurrent programs using actor model.

    • Oct 10th

    Continuous Integration

  • woodpeckerstars1.5k - Woodpecker is a community fork of the Drone CI system.

    • Utilities

  • retry-gostars1.1k - Simple library for retry mechanism.

    • Oct 6th

    Version Control

  • cli - An open-source GitLab command line tool bringing GitLab's cool features to your command line.

    • Oct 2nd

    Third-party APIs

  • go-restcountriesstars3 - Go library for the REST Countries API.

    • Game Development

  • Ebitenginestars7.2k - dead simple 2D game engine in Go.
  • fantasynamestars11 - Fantasy names generator.

    • Logging

  • xylogstars11 - Leveled and structured logging, dynamic fields, high performance, zone management, simple configuration, and readable syntax.

    • Authentication and OAuth

  • gosessionstars12 - This is quick session for net/http in GoLang. This package is perhaps the best implementation of the session mechanism, at least it tries to become one.

    • Sep 22nd

    Logging

  • logstars13 - Simple leveled logging wrapper around standard log package.

    • Sep 18th

    Websites

    Tutorials

  • GopherCoding - Collection of code snippets and tutorials to help tackle every day issues.

    • Sep 17th

    Command Line

    Standard CLI

  • mclistars6 - A minimal but very powerful cli library for Go.

    • Websites

    Tutorials

  • Games With Go - A video series teaching programming and game development.

    • Messaging

  • mobstars8 - mob is a generic-based, simple mediator / event aggregator library. It supports in-process requests / events processing.
  • Ratusstars56 - Ratus is a RESTful asynchronous task queue server.

    • Utilities

  • scanstars39 - Scan sql rows into any type powered by generics.
  • countriesstars67 - All you need when you are working with countries in Go.
  • gratermstars19 - Provides primitives to perform ordered (sequential/concurrent) GRAceful TERMination (aka shutdown) in Go application.

    • Testing

    Scrapers

  • go-recipestars11 - A package for scraping recipes from websites.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Miscellaneous Data Structures and Algorithms

  • quadtreestars16 - Generic, zero-alloc, 100%-test covered quadtree.
  • go-genericsstars7 - Generic slice, map, set, iterator, and goroutine utilities.

    • Goroutines

  • routinestars68 - routine is a ThreadLocal for go library. It encapsulates and provides some easy-to-use, non-competitive, high-performance goroutine context access interfaces, which can help you access coroutine context information more gracefully.
  • go-workerpoolstars6 - Inspired from Java Thread Pool, Go WorkerPool aims to control heavy Go Routines.

    • Code Analysis

  • astystars23 - Converts golang AST to JSON and JSON to AST.

    • Sep 15th

  • ydb-go-sdkstars65 - native and database/sql driver YDB (Yandex Database)

    Authentication and OAuth

  • ketostars3.6k - Open Source (Go) implementation of "Zanzibar: Google's Consistent, Global Authorization System". Ships gRPC, REST APIs, newSQL, and an easy and granular permission language. Supports ACL, RBAC, and other access models.

  • errorsstars1.4k - Go error library with error portability over the network.

    Utilities

  • lancetstars1.7k - A comprehensive, efficient, and reusable util function library of go.
  • countriesstars189 - Full implementation of ISO-3166-1, ISO-4217, ITU-T E.164, Unicode CLDR and IANA ccTLD standards.
  • evaluatorstars35 - Evaluate an expression dynamically based on s-expression. It's simple and easy to extend.
  • jsendstars17 - JSend's implementation written in Go.

    • Networking

  • fullproxystars38 - A fully featured scriptable and daemon configurable proxy and pivoting toolkit with SOCKS5, HTTP, raw ports and reverse proxy protocols.

    Regular Expressions

  • rexstars120 - Regular expressions builder.

    Caches

  • go-cachestars79 - A flexible multi-layer Go caching library to deal with in-memory and shared cache by adopting Cache-Aside pattern.
  • gocachestars1.5k - A complete Go cache library with multiple stores (memory, memcache, redis, ...), chainable, loadable, metrics cache and more.

    • Configuration

  • harvesterstars119 - Harvester, a easy to use static and dynamic configuration package supporting seeding, env vars and Consul integration.
  • kongstars1.1k - Command-line parser with support for arbitrarily complex command-line structures and additional sources of configuration such as YAML, JSON, TOML, etc (successor to kingpin).

    • Database

    Database Schema Migration

  • libschemastars4 - Define your migrations separately in each library. Migrations for open source libraries. MySQL & PostgreSQL.
  • gorm-seederstars5 - Simple database seeder for Gorm ORM.

    • Error Handling

  • errorsstars45 - Drop-in replacement for builtin Go errors. This is a minimal error handling package with custom error types, user friendly messages, Unwrap & Is. With very easy to use and straightforward helper functions.

    • Financial

  • achstars337 - A reader, writer, and validator for Automated Clearing House (ACH) files.

    • Logging

  • go-logstars10 - A logging library with stack traces, object dumping and optional timestamps.

  • abbreviatestars189 - abbreviate is a tool turning long strings in to shorter ones with configurable separators, for example to embed branch names in to deployment stack IDs.

    Data Structures and Algorithms

    Bit-packing and Compression

  • crunchstars61 - Go package implementing buffers for handling various datatypes easily.
  • go-efstars25 - A Go implementation of the Elias-Fano encoding.
  • roaringstars1.8k - Go package implementing compressed bitsets.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Bloom and Cuckoo Filters

  • cuckoo-filterstars230 - Cuckoo filter: a comprehensive cuckoo filter, which is configurable and space optimized compared with other implements, and all features mentioned in original paper is available.
  • cuckoofilterstars936 - Cuckoo filter: a good alternative to a counting bloom filter implemented in Go.
  • ringstars128 - Go implementation of a high performance, thread safe bloom filter.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Data Structure and Algorithm Collections

  • algorithmsstars675 - Algorithms and data structures.CLRS study.
  • go-datastructuresstars6.7k - Collection of useful, performant, and thread-safe data structures.
  • godsstars12.7k - Go Data Structures. Containers, Sets, Lists, Stacks, Maps, BidiMaps, Trees, HashSet etc.
  • gostlstars730 - Data structure and algorithm library for go, designed to provide functions similar to C++ STL.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Iterators

  • goteratorstars11 - Iterator implementation to provide map and reduce functionalities.
  • iterstars169 - Go implementation of C++ STL iterators and algorithms.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Maps

  • dictstars32 - Python-like dictionaries (dict) for Go.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Miscellaneous Data Structures and Algorithms

  • slicesstars8 - Functions that operate on slices; like package strings but adapted to work with slices.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Nullable Types

  • nanstars57 - Zero allocation Nullable structures in one library with handy conversion functions, marshallers and unmarshallers.
  • nullstars28 - Nullable Go types that can be marshalled/unmarshalled to/from JSON.
  • typstars33 - Null Types, Safe primitive type conversion and fetching value from complex structures.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Queues

  • dequestars68 - A highly optimized double-ended queue.
  • dequestars388 - Fast ring-buffer deque (double-ended queue).
  • goconcurrentqueuestars214 - Concurrent FIFO queue.
  • memlogstars63 - An easy to use, lightweight, thread-safe and append-only in-memory data structure inspired by Apache Kafka.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Sets

  • dsustars8 - Disjoint Set data structure implementation in Go.
  • golang-setstars2.7k - Thread-Safe and Non-Thread-Safe high-performance sets for Go.
  • gosetstars50 - A useful Set collection implementation for Go.
  • setstars22 - Simple set data structure implementation in Go using LinkedHashMap.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Text Analysis

  • blevestars8.7k - Modern text indexing library for go.
  • go-adaptive-radix-treestars249 - Go implementation of Adaptive Radix Tree.
  • go-edlibstars361 - Go string comparison and edit distance algorithms library (Levenshtein, LCS, Hamming, Damerau levenshtein, Jaro-Winkler, etc.) compatible with Unicode.
  • triestars610 - Trie implementation in Go.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Trees

  • hashsplitstars12 - Split byte streams into chunks, and arrange chunks into trees, with boundaries determined by content, not position.
  • merklestars7 - Space-efficient computation of Merkle root hashes and inclusion proofs.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Pipes

  • ordered-concurrentlystars16 - Go module that processes work concurrently and returns output in a channel in the order of input.
  • parapipestars21 - FIFO Pipeline which parallels execution on each stage while maintaining the order of messages and results.
  • pipelinestars45 - An implementation of pipelines with fan-in and fan-out.

    • Database

    Caches

  • 2qstars13 - 2Q in-memory cache implementation.
  • couchcachestars58 - RESTful caching micro-service backed by Couchbase server.
  • fastcachestars1.6k - fast thread-safe inmemory cache for big number of entries. Minimizes GC overhead.
  • GCachestars2.1k - Cache library with support for expirable Cache, LFU, LRU and ARC.
  • gdcachestars10 - A pure non-intrusive cache library implemented by golang, you can use it to implement your own distributed cache.
  • go-mcachestars84 - Fast in-memory key:value store/cache library. Pointer caches.
  • groupcachestars11.7k - Groupcache is a caching and cache-filling library, intended as a replacement for memcached in many cases.
  • remember-gostars119 - A universal interface for caching slow database queries (backed by redis, memcached, ristretto, or in-memory).
  • timedmapstars48 - Map with expiring key-value pairs.
  • ttlcachestars500 - An in-memory cache with item expiration and generics.
  • ttlcachestars7 - In-memory key value storage with TTL for each record.

    • Database

    Databases Implemented in Go

  • badgerstars11.4k - Fast key-value store in Go.
  • bboltstars5.9k - An embedded key/value database for Go.
  • Bitcask - Bitcask is an embeddable, persistent and fast key-value (KV) database written in pure Go with predictable read/write performance, low latency and high throughput thanks to the bitcask on-disk layout (LSM+WAL).
  • buntdbstars3.9k - Fast, embeddable, in-memory key/value database for Go with custom indexing and spatial support.
  • cloverstars277 - A lightweight document-oriented NoSQL database written in pure Golang.
  • pudgestars332 - Fast and simple key/value store written using Go's standard library.

    • Database

    Database Tools

  • clickhouse-bulkstars391 - Collects small inserts and sends big requests to ClickHouse servers.

    • Database Drivers

    Interfaces to Multiple Backends

  • cayleystars14.4k - Graph database with support for multiple backends.
  • dscstars26 - Datastore connectivity for SQL, NoSQL, structured files.
  • gokvstars484 - Simple key-value store abstraction and implementations for Go (Redis, Consul, etcd, bbolt, BadgerDB, LevelDB, Memcached, DynamoDB, S3, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, CockroachDB and many more).

    • Database Drivers

    Relational Database Drivers

  • avaticastars103 - Apache Avatica/Phoenix SQL driver for database/sql.
  • bgcstars18 - Datastore Connectivity for BigQuery for go.
  • firebirdsqlstars179 - Firebird RDBMS SQL driver for Go.
  • go-adodbstars130 - Microsoft ActiveX Object DataBase driver for go that uses database/sql.
  • go-mssqldbstars1.7k - Microsoft MSSQL driver for Go.
  • go-oci8stars595 - Oracle driver for go that uses database/sql.
  • go-sql-driver/mysqlstars12.7k - MySQL driver for Go.
  • go-sqlite3stars6.1k - SQLite3 driver for go that uses database/sql.
  • godrorstars395 - Oracle driver for Go, using the ODPI-C driver.
  • gofreetdsstars107 - Microsoft MSSQL driver. Go wrapper over FreeTDS.
  • Kivikstars244 - Kivik provides a common Go and GopherJS client library for CouchDB, PouchDB, and similar databases.
  • pgxstars6.1k - PostgreSQL driver supporting features beyond those exposed by database/sql.
  • pigstars10 - Simple pgxstars6.1k wrapper to execute and scanstars727 query results easily.
  • pqstars7.6k - Pure Go Postgres driver for database/sql.
  • Sqinn-Gostars127 - SQLite with pure Go.
  • sqlhooksstars589 - Attach hooks to any database/sql driver.

    • Database Drivers

    NoSQL Database Drivers

  • aerospike-client-gostars398 - Aerospike client in Go language.
  • arangolitestars73 - Lightweight golang driver for ArangoDB.
  • ascstars9 - Datastore Connectivity for Aerospike for go.
  • forestdbstars33 - Go bindings for ForestDB.
  • go-couchbasestars317 - Couchbase client in Go.
  • go-pilosastars56 - Go client library for Pilosa.
  • go-rejsonstars286 - Golang client for redislabs' ReJSON module using Redigo golang client. Store and manipulate structs as JSON objects in redis with ease.
  • gocbstars339 - Official Couchbase Go SDK.
  • gocosmosstars11 - REST client and standard database/sql driver for Azure Cosmos DB.
  • gocql - Go language driver for Apache Cassandra.
  • godisstars107 - redis client implement by golang, inspired by jedis.
  • godscachestars11 - A wrapper for the Google Cloud Platform Go Datastore package that adds caching using memcached.
  • gomemcachestars1.5k - memcache client library for the Go programming language.
  • gorethinkstars1.6k - Go language driver for RethinkDB.
  • goriakstars28 - Go language driver for Riak KV.
  • mgmstars574 - MongoDB model-based ODM for Go (based on official MongoDB driver).
  • mgostars2k - (unmaintained) MongoDB driver for the Go language that implements a rich and well tested selection of features under a very simple API following standard Go idioms.
  • mongo-go-driverstars7k - Official MongoDB driver for the Go language.
  • neo4jstars28 - Neo4j Rest API Bindings for Golang.
  • Neo4j-GOstars77 - Neo4j REST Client in golang.
  • neoismstars387 - Neo4j client for Golang.
  • qmgostars980 - The MongoDB driver for Go. It‘s based on official MongoDB driver but easier to use like Mgo.
  • redeostars419 - Redis-protocol compatible TCP servers/services.
  • redigostars9.3k - Redigo is a Go client for the Redis database.
  • redisstars15.6k - Redis client for Golang.
  • rueidisstars513 - Fast Redis RESP3 client with auto pipelining and server-assisted client side caching.
  • xredisstars19 - Typesafe, customizable, clean & easy to use Redis client.

    Language Detection

    Slugifiers

  • go-slugifystars82 - Make pretty slug with multiple languages support.
  • slugstars872 - URL-friendly slugify with multiple languages support.

    • Miscellaneous

    Tokenizers

  • gojiebastars2k - This is a Go implementation of jiebastars29.4k which a Chinese word splitting algorithm.
  • gotokenizerstars15 - A tokenizer based on the dictionary and Bigram language models for Golang. (Now only support chinese segmentation)
  • gsestars2k - Go efficient text segmentation; support english, chinese, japanese and other.
  • MMSEGOstars62 - This is a GO implementation of MMSEG which a Chinese word splitting algorithm.
  • prosestars2.9k - Library for text processing that supports tokenization, part-of-speech tagging, named-entity extraction, and more. English only.

    • Miscellaneous

    Translation

  • go-i18nstars2.2k - Package and an accompanying tool to work with localized text.
  • go-localizestars46 - Simple and easy to use i18n (Internationalization and localization) engine - used for translating locale strings.
  • go-mystemstars29 - CGo bindings to Yandex.Mystem - russian morphology analyzer.
  • go-pinyinstars1.3k - CN Hanzi to Hanyu Pinyin converter.
  • gotextstars356 - GNU gettext utilities for Go.
  • icustars21 - Cgo binding for icu4c C library detection and conversion functions. Guaranteed compatibility with version 50.1.
  • iuliia-gostars31 - Transliterate Cyrillic → Latin in every possible way.
  • tstars12 - Another i18n pkg for golang, which follows GNU gettext style and supports .po/.mo files: t.T (gettext), t.N (ngettext), etc. And it contains a cmd tool xtemplate, which can extract messages as a pot file from text/html template.

    • Miscellaneous

    Transliteration

  • encastars12 - Minimal cgo bindings for libenca, which detects character encodings.
  • go-unidecodestars96 - ASCII transliterations of Unicode text.
  • gounidecodestars76 - Unicode transliterator (also known as unidecode) for Go.

    • Testing

    Formatters

  • addressstars55 - Handles address representation, validation and formatting.
  • alignstars78 - A general purpose application that aligns text.
  • bytes - Formats and parses numeric byte values (10K, 2M, 3G, etc.).
  • go-fixedwidthstars67 - Fixed-width text formatting (encoder/decoder with reflection).
  • go-humanizestars3.3k - Formatters for time, numbers, and memory size to human readable format.
  • gotabulatestars291 - Easily pretty-print your tabular data with Go.
  • textwrapstars3 - Wraps text at end of lines. Implementation of textwrap module from Python.

    Markup Languages

  • bafistars66 - Universal JSON, BSON, YAML, XML translator to ANY format using templates.
  • bbConvertstars7 - Converts bbCode to HTML that allows you to add support for custom bbCode tags.
  • blackfridaystars5k - Markdown processor in Go.
  • github_flavored_markdown - GitHub Flavored Markdown renderer (using blackfriday) with fenced code block highlighting, clickable header anchor links.
  • go-output-formatstars8 - Output go structures into multiple formats (YAML/JSON/etc) in your command line app.
  • go-tomlstars1.3k - Go library for the TOML format with query support and handy cli tools.
  • goqstars219 - Declarative unmarshaling of HTML using struct tags with jQuery syntax (uses GoQuery).
  • html-to-markdownstars400 - Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.
  • htmlquerystars524 - An XPath query package for HTML, lets you extract data or evaluate from HTML documents by an XPath expression.
  • mxjstars528 - Encode / decode XML as JSON or map[string]interface{}; extract values with dot-notation paths and wildcards. Replaces x2j and j2x packages.
  • tomlstars4k - TOML configuration format (encoder/decoder with reflection).

  • codetreestars22 - Parses indented code (python, pixy, scarlet, etc.) and returns a tree structure.

  • didstars68 - DID (Decentralized Identifiers) Parser and Stringer in Go.

  • editorconfig-core-gostars108 - Editorconfig file parser and manipulator for Go.

  • music-theorystars412 - Music theory models in Go.

  • PortAudiostars536 - Go bindings for the PortAudio audio I/O library.

    • Authentication and OAuth

  • authbossstars3.2k - Modular authentication system for the web. It tries to remove as much boilerplate and "hard things" as possible so that each time you start a new web project in Go, you can plug it in, configure, and start building your app without having to build an authentication system each time.
  • brancastars45 - branca token specification implementationstars190 for Golang 1.15+.
  • casbinstars13k - Authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC, ABAC.
  • cookiestxtstars14 - provides parser of cookies.txt file format.
  • go-guardianstars407 - Go-Guardian is a golang library that provides a simple, clean, and idiomatic way to create powerful modern API and web authentication that supports LDAP, Basic, Bearer token and Certificate based authentication.
  • go-josestars2k - Fairly complete implementation of the JOSE working group's JSON Web Token, JSON Web Signatures, and JSON Web Encryption specs.
  • gologinstars1.6k - chainable handlers for login with OAuth1 and OAuth2 authentication providers.
  • gorbacstars1.3k - provides a lightweight role-based access control (RBAC) implementation in Golang.
  • gothstars3.9k - provides a simple, clean, and idiomatic way to use OAuth and OAuth2. Handles multiple providers out of the box.
  • jeffstars241 - Simple, flexible, secure and idiomatic web session management with pluggable backends.
  • jwtstars298 - Lightweight JSON Web Token (JWT) library.
  • jwtstars569 - Safe, simple and fast JSON Web Tokens for Go.
  • jwt-authstars221 - JWT middleware for Golang http servers with many configuration options.
  • loginsrvstars1.9k - JWT login microservice with plugable backends such as OAuth2 (Github), htpasswd, osiam.
  • oauth2stars4.4k - Successor of goauth2. Generic OAuth 2.0 package that comes with JWT, Google APIs, Compute Engine and App Engine support.
  • osinstars1.8k - Golang OAuth2 server library.
  • otpgenstars121 - Library to generate TOTP/HOTP codes.
  • otpgostars40 - Time-Based One-Time Password (TOTP) and HMAC-Based One-Time Password (HOTP) library for Go.
  • pasetostars638 - Golang implementation of Platform-Agnostic Security Tokens (PASETO).
  • permissions2stars467 - Library for keeping track of users, login states and permissions. Uses secure cookies and bcrypt.
  • scopestars24 - Easily Manage OAuth2 Scopes In Go.
  • scsstars1.2k - Session Manager for HTTP servers.
  • securecookiestars61 - Efficient secure cookie encoding/decoding.
  • sessionstars110 - Go session management for web servers (including support for Google App Engine - GAE).
  • sessionsstars68 - Dead simple, highly performant, highly customizable sessions service for go http servers.
  • sessionupstars120 - Simple, yet effective HTTP session management and identification package.
  • sjwtstars105 - Simple jwt generator and parser.

    • Blockchain

  • cosmos-sdkstars4.6k - A Framework for Building Public Blockchains in the Cosmos Ecosystem.
  • go-ethereumstars39.7k - Official Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol.
  • gossamerstars358 - A Go implementation of the Polkadot Host.
  • solana-gostars372 - Go library to interface with Solana JSON RPC and WebSocket interfaces.
  • tendermintstars5.2k - High-performance middleware for transforming a state machine written in any programming language into a Byzantine Fault Tolerant replicated state machine using the Tendermint consensus and blockchain protocols.

    • Bot Building

  • echotronstars192 - An elegant and concurrent library for Telegram Bots in Go.
  • ephemeral-rolesstars68 - A Discord bot for managing ephemeral roles based upon voice channel member presence.
  • go-chat-botstars762 - IRC, Slack & Telegram bot written in Go.
  • go-joe - A general-purpose bot library inspired by Hubot but written in Go.
  • go-sarahstars250 - Framework to build bot for desired chat services including LINE, Slack, Gitter and more.
  • go-tgbotstars116 - Pure Golang Telegram Bot API wrapper, generated from swagger file, session-based router and middleware.
  • go-twitch-ircstars260 - Library to write bots for twitch.tv chat
  • Golang CryptoTrading Botstars835 - A golang implementation of a console-based trading bot for cryptocurrency exchanges.
  • govkbotstars41 - Simple Go VK bot library.
  • hanustars141 - Framework for writing Slack bots.
  • Kelpstars933 - official trading and market-making bot for the Stellar DEX. Works out-of-the-box, written in Golang, compatible with centralized exchanges and custom trading strategies.
  • larrystars84 - Larry 🐦 is a really simple Twitter bot generator that tweets random repositories from Github built in Go.
  • margeletstars75 - Framework for building Telegram bots.
  • michastars23 - Go Library for Telegram bot api.
  • oliviastars3.3k - A chatbot built with an artificial neural network.
  • slack-botstars116 - Ready to use Slack Bot for lazy developers: Custom commands, Jenkins, Jira, Bitbucket, Github...
  • slackerstars696 - Easy to use framework to create Slack bots.
  • slackscotstars53 - Another framework for building Slack bots.
  • tbotstars329 - Telegram bot server with API similar to net/http.
  • telebotstars2.8k - Telegram bot framework written in Go.
  • telegostars105 - Telegram Bot API library for Golang with full one-to-one API implementation.
  • telegram-bot-apistars4k - Simple and clean Telegram bot client.
  • teletermstars12 - Telegram Bot Exec Terminal Command.
  • Tenyksstars174 - Service oriented IRC bot using Redis and JSON for messaging.

    • Build Automation

  • 1buildstars187 - Command line tool to frictionlessly manage project-specific commands.
  • ankostars28 - Simple application watcher for multiple programming languages.
  • gaperstars60 - Builds and restarts a Go project when it crashes or some watched file changes.
  • gilbert - Build system and task runner for Go projects.
  • goyekstars309 - Create build pipelines in Go.
  • magestars3.2k - Mage is a make/rake-like build tool using Go.
  • mmakestars1.6k - Modern Make.
  • realizestars4.3k - Go build system with file watchers and live reload. Run, build and watch file changes with custom paths.
  • Taskstars5.9k - simple "Make" alternative.
  • taskctlstars217 - Concurrent task runner.

    • Command Line

    Advanced Console UIs

  • asciigraphstars2k - Go package to make lightweight ASCII line graph ╭┈╯ in command line apps with no other dependencies.
  • aurorastars1.2k - ANSI terminal colors that supports fmt.Printf/Sprintf.
  • box-cli-makerstars243 - Make Highly Customized Boxes for your CLI.
  • cfmtstars89 - Contextual fmt inspired by bootstrap color classes.
  • cfmtstars51 - Simple and convenient formatted stylized output fully compatible with fmt library.
  • chalkstars410 - Intuitive package for prettifying terminal/console output.
  • colourizestars26 - Go library for ANSI colour text in terminals.
  • ctcstars42 - The non-invasive cross-platform terminal color library does not need to modify the Print method.
  • go-atamanstars13 - Go library for rendering ANSI colored text templates in terminals.
  • go-colorablestars648 - Colorable writer for windows.
  • go-colortextstars214 - Go library for color output in terminals.
  • go-isattystars647 - isatty for golang.
  • go-promptstars4.6k - Library for building a powerful interactive prompt, inspired by python-prompt-toolkitstars8k.
  • gocuistars8.6k - Minimalist Go library aimed at creating Console User Interfaces.
  • gommon/color - Style terminal text.
  • gookit/colorstars1.2k - Terminal color rendering tool library, support 16 colors, 256 colors, RGB color rendering output, compatible with Windows.
  • markerstars33 - Easiest way to match and mark strings for colorful terminal outputs.
  • mpbstars1.9k - Multi progress bar for terminal applications.
  • progressbarstars2.8k - Basic thread-safe progress bar that works in every OS.
  • ptermstars3k - A library to beautify console output on every platform with many combinable components.
  • simpletablestars390 - Simple tables in terminal with Go.
  • spinnerstars1.9k - Go package to easily provide a terminal spinner with options.
  • tabbystars320 - A tiny library for super simple Golang tables.
  • tablestars37 - Small library for terminal color based tables .
  • tabularstars66 - Print ASCII tables from command line utilities without the need to pass large sets of data to the API.
  • termbox-gostars4.4k - Termbox is a library for creating cross-platform text-based interfaces.
  • termdashstars2.1k - Go terminal dashboard based on termbox-go and inspired by termuistars12.1k.
  • termenvstars1.2k - Advanced ANSI style & color support for your terminal applications.
  • termuistars12.1k - Go terminal dashboard based on termbox-go and inspired by blessed-contribstars14.9k.
  • uilivestars1.5k - Library for updating terminal output in realtime.
  • uiprogressstars2k - Flexible library to render progress bars in terminal applications.
  • uitablestars661 - Library to improve readability in terminal apps using tabular data.
  • yacspinstars373 - Yet Another CLi Spinner package, for working with terminal spinners.

    • Command Line

    Standard CLI

  • acmdstars61 - Simple, useful and opinionated CLI package in Go.
  • argparsestars463 - Command line argument parser inspired by Python's argparse module.
  • argvstars35 - Go library to split command line string as arguments array using the bash syntax.
  • clistars671 - Feature-rich and easy to use command-line package based on golang struct tags.
  • clistars116 - Simple and complete API for building command line interfaces in Go.
  • climaxstars200 - Alternative CLI with "human face", in spirit of Go command.
  • clîrstars126 - A Simple and Clear CLI library. Dependency free.
  • cmdstars35 - Extends the standard flag package to support sub commands and more in idiomatic way.
  • cmdrstars114 - A POSIX/GNU style, getopt-like command-line UI Go library.
  • cobrastars29k - Commander for modern Go CLI interactions.
  • command-chainstars32 - A go library for configure and run command chains - such like pipelining in unix shells.
  • commandeerstars161 - Dev-friendly CLI apps: sets up flags, defaults, and usage based on struct fields and tags.
  • completestars862 - Write bash completions in Go + Go command bash completion.
  • Dnotestars2.4k - A simple command line notebook with multi-device sync.
  • elvishstars4.8k - An expressive programming language and a versatile interactive shell.
  • envstars98 - Tag-based environment configuration for structs.
  • flagstars123 - Simple but powerful command line option parsing library for Go supporting subcommand.
  • flaggystars815 - A robust and idiomatic flags package with excellent subcommand support.
  • flagvarstars41 - A collection of flag argument types for Go's standard flag package.
  • go-andotpstars18 - A CLI program to encrypt/decrypt andOTPstars3.6k files. Can be used as library as well.
  • go-argstars1.5k - Struct-based argument parsing in Go.
  • go-commanderstars30 - Go library to simplify CLI workflow.
  • go-flagsstars2.3k - go command line option parser.
  • go-getoptionsstars46 - Go option parser inspired on the flexibility of Perl’s GetOpt::Long.
  • gocmdstars60 - Go library for building command line applications.
  • hiboot cli - cli application framework with auto configuration and dependency injection.
  • jobstars121 - JOB, make your short-term command as a long-term job.
  • kingpinstars3.3k - Command line and flag parser supporting sub commands (superseded by kong; see below).
  • linerstars927 - Go readline-like library for command-line interfaces.
  • mitchellh/clistars1.6k - Go library for implementing command-line interfaces.
  • mow.clistars830 - Go library for building CLI applications with sophisticated flag and argument parsing and validation.
  • opsstars1k - Unikernel Builder/Orchestrator.
  • pflagstars1.9k - Drop-in replacement for Go's flag package, implementing POSIX/GNU-style --flags.
  • sandstars19 - Simple API for creating interpreters and so much more.
  • sflagsstars141 - Struct based flags generator for flag, urfave/cli, pflag, cobra, kingpin and other libraries.
  • strumtstars49 - Library to create prompt chain.
  • subcmdstars3 - Another approach to parsing and running subcommands. Works alongside the standard flag package.
  • tsstars16 - Timestamp convert & compare tool.
  • ukautz/clifstars118 - Small command line interface framework.
  • urfave/clistars19.1k - Simple, fast, and fun package for building command line apps in Go (formerly codegangsta/cli).
  • wlogstars59 - Simple logging interface that supports cross-platform color and concurrency.
  • wmenustars177 - Easy to use menu structure for cli applications that prompts users to make choices.

    • Configuration

  • aconfigstars398 - Simple, useful and opinionated config loader.
  • cleanenvstars749 - Minimalistic configuration reader (from files, ENV, and wherever you want).
  • configstars318 - Cloud native application configuration. Bind ENV to structs in only two lines.
  • configstars255 - JSON or YAML configuration wrapper with environment variables and flags parsing.
  • configurationstars80 - Library for initializing configuration structs from env variables, files, flags and 'default' tag.
  • configurestars57 - Provides configuration through multiple sources, including JSON, flags and environment variables.
  • configurostars81 - opinionated configuration loading & validation framework from ENV and Files focused towards 12-Factor compliant applications.
  • confitastars457 - Load configuration in cascade from multiple backends into a struct.
  • conflatestars26 - Library/tool to merge multiple JSON/YAML/TOML files from arbitrary URLs, validation against a JSON schema, and application of default values defined in the schema.
  • envstars2.7k - Parse environment variables to Go structs (with defaults).
  • envstars29 - A lightweight package for loading environment variables into structs.
  • envcfgstars99 - Un-marshaling environment variables to Go structs.
  • envconfstars11 - Configuration from environment.
  • envconfigstars228 - Read your configuration from environment variables.
  • envhstars96 - Helpers to manage environment variables.
  • figstars237 - Tiny library for reading configuration from a file and from environment variables (with validation & defaults).
  • gcfgstars163 - read INI-style configuration files into Go structs; supports user-defined types and subsections.
  • genvstars30 - Read environment variables easily with dotenv support.
  • go-aws-ssmstars51 - Go package that fetches parameters from AWS System Manager - Parameter Store.
  • go-confstars5 - Simple library for application configuration based on annotated structs. It supports reading the configuration from environment variables, config files and command line parameters.
  • go-inistars8 - A Go package that marshals and unmarshals INI-files.
  • go-ssm-configstars17 - Go utility for loading configuration parameters from AWS SSM (Parameter Store).
  • go-upstars38 - A simple configuration library with recursive placeholders resolution and no magic.
  • goConfigstars1 - Parses a struct as input and populates the fields of this struct with parameters from command line, environment variables and configuration file.
  • godotenvstars5.4k - Go port of Ruby's dotenv library (Loads environment variables from .env).
  • gofigurestars65 - Go application configuration made easy.
  • gone/jconf - Modular JSON configuration. Keep you config structs along with the code they configure and delegate parsing to submodules without sacrificing full config serialization.
  • gonfigstars5 - Tag-based configuration parser which loads values from different providers into typesafe struct.
  • gookit/configstars404 - application config manage(load,get,set). support JSON, YAML, TOML, INI, HCL. multi file load, data override merge.
  • hjsonstars281 - Human JSON, a configuration file format for humans. Relaxed syntax, fewer mistakes, more comments.
  • hoconstars49 - Configuration library for working with the HOCON(a human-friendly JSON superset) format, supports features like environment variables, referencing other values, comments and multiple files.
  • ingostars36 - Flags persisted in an ini-like config file.
  • inistars3.1k - Go package to read and write INI files.
  • inistars10 - INI Parser & Write Library, Unmarshal to Struct,Marshal to Json,Write File,watch file.
  • joshbetz/configstars215 - Small configuration library for Go that parses environment variables, JSON files, and reloads automatically on SIGHUP.
  • kelseyhightower/envconfigstars4.3k - Go library for managing configuration data from environment variables.
  • koanfstars1.2k - Light weight, extensible library for reading config in Go applications. Built in support for JSON, TOML, YAML, env, command line.
  • konfigstars632 - Composable, observable and performant config handling for Go for the distributed processing era.
  • ministars32 - Golang package for parsing ini-style configuration files.
  • nasermirzaei89/envstars9 - Simple useful package for read environment variables.
  • onionstars109 - Layer based configuration for Go, Supports JSON, TOML, YAML, properties, etcd, env, and encryption using PGP.
  • piperstars7 - Viper wrapper with config inheritance and key generation.
  • storestars263 - Lightweight configuration manager for Go.
  • swapstars7 - Instantiate/configure structs recursively, based on build environment. (YAML, TOML, JSON and env).
  • typenvstars9 - Minimalistic, zero dependency, typed environment variables library.
  • uConfigstars53 - Lightweight, zero-dependency, and extendable configuration management.
  • viperstars20.9k - Go configuration with fangs.
  • xdgstars273 - Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories.
  • xdgstars72 - Cross platform package that follows the XDG Standard.

    • Continuous Integration

  • CDSstars4k - Enterprise-Grade CI/CD and DevOps Automation Open Source Platform.
  • dronestars25.9k - Drone is a Continuous Integration platform built on Docker, written in Go.
  • ducistars76 - A simple ci server no needs domain specific languages.
  • gomasonstars54 - Test, Build, Sign, and Publish your go binaries from a clean workspace.
  • goverallsstars740 - Go integration for Coveralls.io continuous code coverage tracking system.
  • overallsstars112 - Multi-Package go project coverprofile for tools like goveralls.
  • roverallsstars19 - Recursive coverage testing tool.

  • gcssstars466 - Pure Go CSS Preprocessor.
  • go-libsassstars190 - Go wrapper to the 100% Sass compatible libsass project.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Bit-packing and Compression

  • bingostars14 - Fast, zero-allocation, lexicographical-order-preserving packing of native types to bytes.
  • binpackerstars195 - Binary packer and unpacker helps user build custom binary stream.
  • bitstars135 - Golang set data structure with bonus bit-twiddling functions.

    Bit Sets

  • bitmapstars172 - Dense, zero-allocation, SIMD-enabled bitmap/bitset in Go.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Bloom and Cuckoo Filters

  • bloomstars148 - Bloom filters implemented in Go.
  • bloomstars74 - Golang Bloom filter implementation.
  • bloomfilterstars10 - Yet another Bloomfilter implementation in Go, compatible with Java's Guava library.
  • boomfiltersstars1.5k - Probabilistic data structures for processing continuous, unbounded streams.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Maps

  • cmapstars37 - a thread-safe concurrent map for go, support using interface{} as key and auto scale up shards.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Miscellaneous Data Structures and Algorithms

  • concurrent-writerstars46 - Highly concurrent drop-in replacement for bufio.Writer.
  • conjungostars108 - A small, powerful and flexible merge library.
  • count-min-logstars58 - Go implementation Count-Min-Log sketch: Approximately counting with approximate counters (Like Count-Min sketch but using less memory).
  • fsmstars32 - Finite-State Machine package.
  • go-geoindexstars341 - In-memory geo index.
  • go-rquadstars123 - Region quadtrees with efficient point location and neighbour finding.
  • gofalstars17 - fractional api for Go.
  • gotastars2.4k - Implementation of dataframes, series, and data wrangling methods for Go.
  • hidestars51 - ID type with marshalling to/from hash to prevent sending IDs to clients.
  • hilbertstars255 - Go package for mapping values to and from space-filling curves, such as Hilbert and Peano curves.
  • hyperloglogstars803 - HyperLogLog implementation with Sparse, LogLog-Beta bias correction and TailCut space reduction.

    • Data Structures and Algorithms

    Text Analysis

  • levenshteinstars70 - Levenshtein distance and similarity metrics with customizable edit costs and Winkler-like bonus for common prefix.
  • levenshteinstars238 - Implementation to calculate levenshtein distance in Go.
  • mspmstars18 - Multi-String Pattern Matching Algorithm for information retrieval.
  • parsefieldsstars7 - Tools for parse JSON-like logs for collecting unique fields and events.
  • ptriestars29 - An implementation of prefix tree.

    Trees

  • skipliststars231 - Very fast Go Skiplist implementation.
  • skipliststars79 - Skiplist implementation in Go.
  • treapstars20 - Persistent, fast ordered map using tree heaps.

    • Database

    Caches

  • BigCachestars6k - Efficient key/value cache for gigabytes of data.
  • cachestars116 - In-memory key:value store with expiration time, 0 dependencies, <100 LoC, 100% coverage.
  • cache2gostars1.8k - In-memory key:value cache which supports automatic invalidation based on timeouts.
  • clusteredBigCachestars42 - BigCache with clustering support and individual item expiration.

    • Database

    Databases Implemented in Go

  • cockroachstars25.8k - Scalable, Geo-Replicated, Transactional Datastore.
  • Cofferstars31 - Simple ACID key-value database that supports transactions.
  • columnstars991 - High-performance, columnar, embeddable in-memory store with bitmap indexing and transactions.
  • CovenantSQLstars1.4k - CovenantSQL is a SQL database on blockchain.
  • Databunkerstars1k - Personally identifiable information (PII) storage service built to comply with GDPR and CCPA.
  • dgraphstars18.5k - Scalable, Distributed, Low Latency, High Throughput Graph Database.
  • diskvstars1.2k - Home-grown disk-backed key-value store.
  • eliasdbstars949 - Dependency-free, transactional graph database with REST API, phrase search and SQL-like query language.
  • godisstars2.2k - A Golang implemented high-performance Redis server and cluster.
  • goleveldbstars5.4k - Implementation of the LevelDBstars30.9k key/value database in Go.
  • harestars62 - A simple database management system that stores each table as a text file of line-delimited JSON.
  • immudbstars7.9k - immudb is a lightweight, high-speed immutable database for systems and applications written in Go.
  • influxdbstars24.3k - Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics.
  • ledisdbstars3.9k - Ledisdb is a high performance NoSQL like Redis based on LevelDB.
  • levigostars407 - Levigo is a Go wrapper for LevelDB.
  • lotusdbstars980 - Fast k/v database compatible with lsm and b+tree.
  • Milvusstars13.9k - Milvus is a vector database for embedding management, analytics and search.
  • mossstars893 - Moss is a simple LSM key-value storage engine written in 100% Go.
  • piladbstars199 - Lightweight RESTful database engine based on stack data structures.
  • pogrebstars941 - Embedded key-value store for read-heavy workloads.
  • prometheusstars44.8k - Monitoring system and time series database.
  • rosedbstars3.2k - An embedded k-v database based on LSM+WAL, supports string, list, hash, set, zset.
  • rqlitestars11.2k - The lightweight, distributed, relational database built on SQLite.
  • tempdbstars17 - Key-value store for temporary items.
  • tidbstars32.6k - TiDB is a distributed SQL database. Inspired by the design of Google F1.
  • tiedotstars2.7k - Your NoSQL database powered by Golang.
  • Vastostars240 - A distributed high-performance key-value store. On Disk. Eventual consistent. HA. Able to grow or shrink without service interruption.
  • VictoriaMetricsstars7.3k - fast, resource-effective and scalable open source time series database. May be used as long-term remote storage for Prometheus. Supports PromQL.

    • Database

    Database Schema Migration

  • atlasstars2k - A Database Toolkit. A CLI designed to help companies better work with their data.
  • avrostars40 - Discover SQL schemas and convert them to AVRO schemas. Query SQL records into AVRO bytes.
  • darwinstars135 - Database schema evolution library for Go.
  • go-fixturesstars29 - Django style fixtures for Golang's excellent built-in database/sql library.
  • go-pg-migratestars8 - CLI-friendly package for go-pg migrations management.
  • go-pg-migrationsstars81 - A Go package to help write migrations with go-pg/pg.
  • goavrostars843 - A Go package that encodes and decodes Avro data.
  • goosestars3.1k - Database migration tool. You can manage your database's evolution by creating incremental SQL or Go scripts.
  • gormigratestars826 - Database schema migration helper for Gorm ORM.
  • migratestars9.9k - Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.
  • migratorstars132 - Dead simple Go database migration library.
  • migratorstars20 - MySQL database migrator designed to run migrations to your features and manage database schema update with intuitive go code.
  • pravasanstars29 - Simple Migration tool - currently for MySQL but planning to soon support Postgres, SQLite, MongoDB, etc.
  • schemastars25 - Library to embed schema migrations for database/sql-compatible databases inside your Go binaries.
  • skeemastars1.1k - Pure-SQL schema management system for MySQL, with support for sharding and external online schema change tools.
  • soda - Database migration, creation, ORM, etc... for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite.
  • sql-migratestars2.6k - Database migration tool. Allows embedding migrations into the application using go-bindata.
  • sqlizestars42 - Database migration generator. Allows generate sql migration from model and existing sql by differ them.

    • Database

    Database Tools

  • chproxystars998 - HTTP proxy for ClickHouse database.
  • datagenstars50 - A fast data generator that's multi-table aware and supports multi-row DML.
  • dbbenchstars75 - Database benchmarking tool with support for several databases and scripts.
  • go-mysqlstars3.8k - Go toolset to handle MySQL protocol and replication.
  • go-mysql-elasticsearchstars3.8k - Sync your MySQL data into Elasticsearch automatically.
  • kingshardstars6.1k - kingshard is a high performance proxy for MySQL powered by Golang.
  • myreplicationstars188 - MySql binary log replication listener. Supports statement and row based replication.
  • octillerystars173 - Go package for sharding databases ( Supports every ORM or raw SQL ).
  • orchestratorstars4.7k - MySQL replication topology manager & visualizer.
  • pg_timetablestars798 - Advanced scheduling for PostgreSQL.
  • pgwebstars7.5k - Web-based PostgreSQL database browser.
  • prepstars32 - Use prepared SQL statements without changing your code.
  • pRESTstars3.4k - Simplify and accelerate development, ⚡ instant, realtime, high-performance on any Postgres application, existing or new.
  • rwdbstars16 - rwdb provides read replica capability for multiple database servers setup.
  • vitessstars14.9k - vitess provides servers and tools which facilitate scaling of MySQL databases for large scale web services.

    • Database

    SQL Query Builders

  • bqbstars49 - Lightweight and easy to learn query builder.
  • buildsqlxstars80 - Go database query builder library for PostgreSQL.
  • dbqstars352 - Zero boilerplate database operations for Go.
  • Dotsqlstars648 - Go library that helps you keep sql files in one place and use them with ease.
  • gendrystars1.4k - Non-invasive SQL builder and powerful data binder.
  • godbalstars54 - Database Abstraction Layer (dbal) for go. Support SQL builder and get result easily.
  • goqustars1.7k - Idiomatic SQL builder and query library.
  • gosqlstars26 - SQL Query builder with better null values support.
  • igorstars88 - Abstraction layer for PostgreSQL that supports advanced functionality and uses gorm-like syntax.
  • jetstars821 - Framework for writing type-safe SQL queries in Go, with ability to easily convert database query result into desired arbitrary object structure.
  • ormlitestars4 - Lightweight package containing some ORM-like features and helpers for sqlite databases.
  • ozzo-dbxstars579 - Powerful data retrieval methods as well as DB-agnostic query building capabilities.
  • qrystars23 - Tool that generates constants from files with raw SQL queries.
  • sqstars174 - Type-safe SQL builder and struct mapper for Go.
  • sqlfstars85 - Fast SQL query builder.
  • sqlingostars267 - A lightweight DSL to build SQL in Go.
  • sqrlstars245 - SQL query builder, fork of Squirrel with improved performance.
  • Squalus - Thin layer over the Go SQL package that makes it easier to perform queries.
  • Squirrelstars5.2k - Go library that helps you build SQL queries.
  • xostars3.2k - Generate idiomatic Go code for databases based on existing schema definitions or custom queries supporting PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Oracle, and Microsoft SQL Server.

    • Date and Time

  • carbonstars2.3k - A simple, semantic and developer-friendly golang package for datetime.
  • carbonstars728 - Simple Time extension with a lot of util methods, ported from PHP Carbon library.
  • cronrangestars18 - Parses Cron-style time range expressions, checks if the given time is within any ranges.
  • datestars97 - Augments Time for working with dates, date ranges, time spans, periods, and time-of-day.
  • dateparsestars1.8k - Parse date's without knowing format in advance.
  • durafmtstars448 - Time duration formatting library for Go.
  • feiertagestars43 - Set of functions to calculate public holidays in Germany, incl. specialization on the states of Germany (Bundesländer). Things like Easter, Pentecost, Thanksgiving...
  • go-persian-calendarstars129 - The implementation of the Persian (Solar Hijri) Calendar in Go (golang).
  • go-str2durationstars50 - Convert string to duration. Support time.Duration returned string and more.
  • go-sunrisestars59 - Calculate the sunrise and sunset times for a given location.
  • go-weekstars8 - An efficient package to work with ISO8601 week dates.
  • gostradamusstars171 - A Go package for working with dates.
  • iso8601stars108 - Efficiently parse ISO8601 date-times without regex.
  • kairstars24 - Date and Time - Golang Formatting Library.
  • nowstars3.8k - Now is a time toolkit for golang.
  • NullTimestars13 - Nullable time.Time.
  • strftimestars11 - C99-compatible strftime formatter.
  • timespanstars82 - For interacting with intervals of time, defined as a start time and a duration.
  • timeutilstars190 - Useful extensions (Timedelta, Strftime, ...) to the golang's time package.
  • tuesdaystars12 - Ruby-compatible Strftime function.

    • Distributed Systems

  • arpcstars613 - More effective network communication, support two-way-calling, notify, broadcast.
  • celeriacstars74 - Library for adding support for interacting and monitoring Celery workers, tasks and events in Go.
  • consistentstars517 - Consistent hashing with bounded loads.
  • consistenthashstars14 - Consistent hashing with configurable replicas.
  • dhtstars246 - BitTorrent Kademlia DHT implementation.
  • digotastars464 - grpc ecommerce microservice.
  • dotstars73 - distributed sync using operational transformation/OT.
  • doublejumpstars80 - A revamped Google's jump consistent hash.
  • dragonboatstars4.4k - A feature complete and high performance multi-group Raft library in Go.
  • drmaastars42 - Job submission library for cluster schedulers based on the DRMAA standard.
  • dynamolock - DynamoDB-backed distributed locking implementation.
  • dynatomicstars15 - A library for using DynamoDB as an atomic counter.
  • emitter-iostars3.4k - High performance, distributed, secure and low latency publish-subscribe platform built with MQTT, Websockets and love.
  • failuredstars7 - adaptive accrual failure detector for distributed systems.
  • flowgraphstars53 - flow-based programming package.
  • gleamstars3.1k - Fast and scalable distributed map/reduce system written in pure Go and Luajit, combining Go's high concurrency with Luajit's high performance, runs standalone or distributed.
  • glowstars3.1k - Easy-to-Use scalable distributed big data processing, Map-Reduce, DAG execution, all in pure Go.
  • gmsecstars23 - A Go distributed systems development framework.
  • go-doudoustars863 - A gossip protocol and OpenAPI 3.0 spec based decentralized microservice framework. Built-in go-doudou cli focusing on low-code and rapid dev can power up your productivity.
  • go-healthstars640 - Library for enabling asynchronous dependency health checks in your service.
  • go-jumpstars352 - Port of Google's "Jump" Consistent Hash function.
  • go-kitstars24k - Microservice toolkit with support for service discovery, load balancing, pluggable transports, request tracking, etc.
  • go-microstars19.5k - A distributed systems development framework.
  • go-mysql-lockstars49 - MySQL based distributed lock.
  • go-pdustars41 - A decentralized identity-based social network.
  • go-sundheitstars499 - A library built to provide support for defining async service health checks for golang services.
  • go-zerostars20.9k - A web and rpc framework. It's born to ensure the stability of the busy sites with resilient design. Builtin goctl greatly improves the development productivity.
  • gorpcstars661 - Simple, fast and scalable RPC library for high load.
  • grpc-gostars16.9k - The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC.
  • hprosestars1.2k - Very newbility RPC Library, support 25+ languages now.
  • jsonrpcstars170 - The jsonrpc package helps implement of JSON-RPC 2.0.
  • jsonrpcstars250 - JSON-RPC 2.0 HTTP client implementation.
  • Kratosstars19k - A modular-designed and easy-to-use microservices framework in Go.
  • liftbridgestars2.4k - Lightweight, fault-tolerant message streams for NATS.
  • lurastars5.3k - Ultra performant API Gateway framework with middlewares.
  • microstars11.4k - A distributed systems runtime for the cloud and beyond.
  • NATSstars11.7k - Lightweight, high performance messaging system for microservices, IoT, and cloud native systems.
  • outboxerstars90 - Outboxer is a go library that implements the outbox pattern.
  • pglock - PostgreSQL-backed distributed locking implementation.
  • pjrpc - Golang JSON-RPC Server-Client with Protobuf spec.
  • raftstars6.4k - Golang implementation of the Raft consensus protocol, by HashiCorp.
  • raft - Go implementation of the Raft consensus protocol, by CoreOS.
  • rainstars774 - BitTorrent client and library.
  • redis-lockstars827 - Simplified distributed locking implementation using Redis.
  • resgate - Realtime API Gateway for building REST, real time, and RPC APIs, where all clients are synchronized seamlessly.
  • ringpop-gostars753 - Scalable, fault-tolerant application-layer sharding for Go applications.
  • rpcxstars7.3k - Distributed pluggable RPC service framework like alibaba Dubbo.
  • Semaphorestars77 - A straightforward (micro) service orchestrator.
  • sleuthstars358 - Library for master-less p2p auto-discovery and RPC between HTTP services (using ZeroMQstars8.1k).
  • torrentstars4.5k - BitTorrent client package.

    • Dynamic DNS

  • DDNSstars222 - Personal DDNS client with Digital Ocean Networking DNS as backend.
  • dyndns - Background Go process to regularly and automatically check your IP Address and make updates to (one or many) Dynamic DNS records for Google domains whenever your address changes.
  • GoDNSstars1.2k - A dynamic DNS client tool, supports DNSPod & HE.net, written in Go.

    • Email

  • chasquid - SMTP server written in Go.
  • douceurstars222 - CSS inliner for your HTML emails.
  • emailstars2.2k - A robust and flexible email library for Go.
  • email-verifierstars526 - A Go library for email verification without sending any emails.
  • go-dkimstars82 - DKIM library, to sign & verify email.
  • go-email-validatorstars40 - Modular email validator for syntax, disposable, smtp, etc... checking.
  • go-imapstars1.6k - IMAP library for clients and servers.
  • go-messagestars273 - Streaming library for the Internet Message Format and mail messages.
  • go-premailerstars94 - Inline styling for HTML mail in Go.
  • go-simple-mailstars389 - Very simple package to send emails with SMTP Keep Alive and two timeouts: Connect and Send.
  • Hectanestars221 - Lightweight SMTP client providing an HTTP API.
  • hermesstars2.5k - Golang package that generates clean, responsive HTML e-mails.
  • mailchainstars128 - Send encrypted emails to blockchain addresses written in Go.
  • mailgun-gostars622 - Go library for sending mail with the Mailgun API.
  • MailHogstars10.9k - Email and SMTP testing with web and API interface.
  • SendGridstars855 - SendGrid's Go library for sending email.
  • smtpstars73 - SMTP server protocol state machine.
  • smtpmockstars55 - Lightweight configurable multithreaded fake SMTP server. Mimic any SMTP behaviour for your test environment.

    • Embeddable Scripting Languages

  • ankostars1.3k - Scriptable interpreter written in Go.
  • binderstars64 - Go to Lua binding library, based on gopher-luastars5k.
  • cel-gostars1.3k - Fast, portable, non-Turing complete expression evaluation with gradual typing.
  • ecalstars27 - A simple embeddable scripting language which supports concurrent event processing.
  • exprstars3k - Expression evaluation engine for Go: fast, non-Turing complete, dynamic typing, static typing.
  • genteestars100 - Embeddable scripting programming language.
  • gispstars493 - Simple LISP in Go.
  • go-duktapestars778 - Duktape JavaScript engine bindings for Go.
  • go-luastars2.5k - Port of the Lua 5.2 VM to pure Go.
  • go-phpstars874 - PHP bindings for Go.
  • go-pythonstars1.4k - naive go bindings to the CPython C-API.
  • gojastars3.3k - ECMAScript 5.1(+) implementation in Go.
  • goluastars597 - Go bindings for Lua C API.
  • gopher-luastars5k - Lua 5.1 VM and compiler written in Go.
  • gvalstars538 - A highly customizable expression language written in Go.
  • metacallstars1.1k - Cross-platform Polyglot Runtime which supports NodeJS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Ruby, C#, WebAssembly, Java, Cobol and more.
  • ngarostars23 - Embeddable Ngaro VM implementation enabling scripting in Retro.
  • prologstars435 - Embeddable Prolog.
  • purlstars35 - Perl 5.18.2 embedded in Go.
  • tengostars2.9k - Bytecode compiled script language for Go.

    • Error Handling

  • emperrorstars264 - Error handling tools and best practices for Go libraries and applications.
  • erisstars1.1k - A better way to handle, trace, and log errors in Go. Compatible with the standard error library and github.com/pkg/errors.
  • errlogstars410 - Hackable package that determines responsible source code for an error (and some other fast-debugging features). Pluggable to any logger in-place.
  • errorsstars163 - Drop-in replacement for the standard library errors package and github.com/pkg/errors. Provides various error handling primitives.
  • errorsstars7.9k - Package that provides simple error handling primitives.
  • errorsstars4 - Simple golang error handling with classification primitives.
  • errorsstars7 - The most simple error wrapper with awesome performance and minimal memory overhead.
  • errorxstars898 - A feature rich error package with stack traces, composition of errors and more.
  • Falconstars8 - A Simple Yet Highly Powerful Package For Error Handling.
  • go-multierrorstars1.7k - Go (golang) package for representing a list of errors as a single error.
  • tracerrstars742 - Golang errors with stack trace and source fragments.

    • File Handling

  • aferostars4.8k - FileSystem Abstraction System for Go.
  • afsstars206 - Abstract File Storage (mem, scp, zip, tar, cloud: s3, gs) for Go.
  • barakastars46 - A library to process http file uploads easily.
  • bigfilestars232 - A file transfer system, support to manage files with http api, rpc call and ftp client.
  • checksumstars69 - Compute message digest, like MD5, SHA256, SHA1, CRC or BLAKE2s, for large files.
  • copystars463 - Copy directory recursively.
  • flopstars32 - File operations library which aims to mirror feature parity with GNU cp.
  • gdustars2k - Disk usage analyzer with console interface.
  • go-csv-tagstars98 - Load csv file using tag.
  • go-decent-copystars17 - Copy files for humans.
  • go-exiftoolstars136 - Go bindings for ExifTool, the well-known library used to extract as much metadata as possible (EXIF, IPTC, ...) from files (pictures, PDF, office, ...).
  • go-gtfsstars33 - Load gtfs files in go.
  • gut/yosstars25 - Simple and reliable package for file operations like copy/move/diff/list on files, directories and symbolic links.
  • higgsstars13 - A tiny cross-platform Go library to hide/unhide files and directories.
  • notifystars764 - File system event notification library with simple API, similar to os/signal.
  • opcstars73 - Load Open Packaging Conventions (OPC) files for Go.
  • parquetstars58 - Read and write parquet files.
  • pathtypestars12 - Treat paths as their own type instead of using strings.
  • pdfcpustars3.4k - PDF processor.
  • skywalkerstars85 - Package to allow one to concurrently go through a filesystem with ease.
  • tarfsstars51 - Implementation of the FileSystem interface for tar files.
  • todotxtstars16 - Go library for Gina Trapani's todo.txt files, supports parsing and manipulating of task lists in the todo.txt format.
  • vfsstars199 - A pluggable, extensible, and opinionated set of filesystem functionality for Go across a number of filesystem types such as os, S3, and GCS.

    • Financial

  • accountingstars770 - money and currency formatting for golang.
  • currencystars337 - Handles currency amounts, provides currency information and formatting.
  • currencystars51 - High performant & accurate currency computation package.
  • decimalstars4.4k - Arbitrary-precision fixed-point decimal numbers.
  • fastme - Fast extensible matching engine Go implementation.
  • go-financestars537 - Comprehensive financial markets data in Go.
  • go-financestars143 - Library of financial functions for time value of money (annuities), cash flow, interest rate conversions, bonds and depreciation calculations.
  • go-financestars10 - Module to fetch exchange rates, check VAT numbers via VIES and check IBAN bank account numbers.
  • go-finnhubstars76 - Client for stock market, forex and crypto data from finnhub.io. Access real-time financial market data from 60+ stock exchanges, 10 forex brokers, and 15+ crypto exchanges.
  • go-moneystars1.2k - Implementation of Fowler's Money pattern.
  • ofxgostars111 - Query OFX servers and/or parse the responses (with example command-line client).
  • orderbookstars297 - Matching Engine for Limit Order Book in Golang.
  • paymestars12 - QR code generator (ASCII & PNG) for SEPA payments.
  • sleetstars100 - One unified interface for multiple Payment Service Providers (PsP) to process online payment.
  • techanstars682 - Technical analysis library with advanced market analysis and trading strategies.
  • tickerstars4.4k - Terminal stock watcher and stock position tracker.
  • transactionstars116 - Embedded transactional database of accounts, running in multithreaded mode.
  • vatstars99 - VAT number validation & EU VAT rates.

    • Forms

  • bindstars28 - Bind form data to any Go values.
  • bindingstars790 - Binds form and JSON data from net/http Request to struct.
  • conformstars273 - Keeps user input in check. Trims, sanitizes & scrubs data based on struct tags.
  • formstars558 - Decodes url.Values into Go value(s) and Encodes Go value(s) into url.Values. Dual Array and Full map support.
  • formamstars175 - decode form's values into a struct.
  • formsstars132 - Framework-agnostic library for parsing and validating form/JSON data which supports multipart forms and files.
  • gorilla/csrfstars835 - CSRF protection for Go web applications & services.
  • nosurfstars1.3k - CSRF protection middleware for Go.
  • qsstars64 - Go module for encoding structs into URL query parameters.
  • queryparamstars14 - Decode url.Values into usable struct values of standard or custom types.

    • Functional

  • fpGostars296 - Monad, Functional Programming features for Golang.
  • fuegostars125 - Functional Experiment in Go.
  • go-underscorestars1.3k - Useful collection of helpfully functional Go collection utilities.
  • gofpstars132 - A lodash like powerful utility library for Golang.

    • Game Development

  • Azul3Dstars558 - 3D game engine written in Go.
  • engostars1.5k - Engo is an open-source 2D game engine written in Go. It follows the Entity-Component-System paradigm.
  • g3nstars2.2k - Go 3D Game Engine.
  • go-astarstars524 - Go implementation of the A* path finding algorithm.
  • go-sdl2stars1.8k - Go bindings for the Simple DirectMedia Layer.
  • go3dstars273 - Performance oriented 2D/3D math package for Go.
  • gonetstars1.2k - Game server skeleton implemented with golang.
  • goworldstars2.2k - Scalable game server engine, featuring space-entity framework and hot-swapping.
  • Leafstars4.6k - Lightweight game server framework.
  • nanostars2.1k - Lightweight, facility, high performance golang based game server framework.
  • Oakstars1.3k - Pure Go game engine.
  • Pitayastars1.6k - Scalable game server framework with clustering support and client libraries for iOS, Android, Unity and others through the C SDK.
  • Pixelstars4.1k - Hand-crafted 2D game library in Go.
  • prototypestars76 - Cross-platform (Windows/Linux/Mac) library for creating desktop games using a minimal API.
  • raylib-gostars880 - Go bindings for raylib, a simple and easy-to-use library to learn videogames programming.
  • termloopstars1.3k - Terminal-based game engine for Go, built on top of Termbox.
  • tilestars72 - Data-oriented and cache-friendly 2D Grid library (TileMap), includes pathfinding, observers and import/export.

    • Generators

  • generisstars38 - Code generation tool providing generics, free-form macros, conditional compilation and HTML templating.
  • go-enumstars382 - Code generation for enums from code comments.
  • go-linqstars3.1k - .NET LINQ-like query methods for Go.
  • go-xraystars24 - Helpers for making the use of reflection easier.
  • goderivestars1k - Derives functions from input types.
  • gotypestars50 - Golang source code parsing, usage like reflect package.
  • goverterstars158 - Generate converters by defining an interface.
  • GoWrapstars673 - Generate decorators for Go interfaces using simple templates.
  • interfacesstars357 - Command line tool for generating interface definitions.
  • jenniferstars2.6k - Generate arbitrary Go code without templates.
  • typeregistrystars15 - A library to create type dynamically.

    • Geographic

  • geoserverstars76 - geoserver Is a Go Package For Manipulating a GeoServer Instance via the GeoServer REST API.
  • gismanagerstars48 - Publish Your GIS Data(Vector Data) to PostGIS and Geoserver.
  • godalstars82 - Go wrapper for GDAL.
  • mbtileserverstars401 - A simple Go-based server for map tiles stored in mbtiles format.
  • osmstars236 - Library for reading, writing and working with OpenStreetMap data and APIs.
  • pbfstars39 - OpenStreetMap PBF golang encoder/decoder.
  • S2 geojsonstars19 - Convert geojson to s2 cells & demonstrating some S2 geometry features on map.
  • S2 geometrystars1.4k - S2 geometry library in Go.
  • simplefeaturesstars64 - simplesfeatures is a 2D geometry library that provides Go types that model geometries, as well as algorithms that operate on them.
  • Tile38stars8.3k - Geolocation DB with spatial index and realtime geofencing.
  • WGS84stars90 - Library for Coordinate Conversion and Transformation (ETRS89, OSGB36, NAD83, RGF93, Web Mercator, UTM).

    • Go Compilers

  • c4gostars327 - Transpile C code to Go code.
  • esp32stars55 - Transpile Go into Arduino code.
  • f4gostars34 - Transpile FORTRAN 77 code to Go code.
  • gopherjsstars11.5k - Compiler from Go to JavaScript.
  • tardisgostars420 - Golang to Haxe to CPP/CSharp/Java/JavaScript transpiler.

    • Goroutines

  • antsstars9.3k - A high-performance and low-cost goroutine pool in Go.
  • artifexstars137 - Simple in-memory job queue for Golang using worker-based dispatching.
  • asyncstars92 - An alternative sync library for Go (Future, Promise, Locks).
  • asyncstars113 - A safe way to execute functions asynchronously, recovering them in case of panic.
  • breakerstars8 - Flexible mechanism to make execution flow interruptible.
  • channelifystars25 - Transform your function to return channels for easy and powerful parallel processing.
  • concurrency-limiterstars10 - Concurrency limiter with support for timeouts , dynamic priority and context cancellation of goroutines.
  • conexecstars13 - A concurrent toolkit to help execute funcs concurrently in an efficient and safe way. It supports specifying the overall timeout to avoid blocking and uses goroutine pool to improve efficiency.
  • cyclicbarrierstars112 - CyclicBarrier for golang.
  • execpoolstars13 - A pool built around exec.Cmd that spins up a given number of processes in advance and attaches stdin and stdout to them when needed. Very similar to FastCGI or Apache Prefork MPM but works for any command.
  • go-flocstars261 - Orchestrate goroutines with ease.
  • go-flowstars200 - Control goroutines execution order.
  • go-tools/multithreadingstars8 - Manage a pool of goroutines using this lightweight library with a simple API.
  • go-trylockstars32 - TryLock support on read-write lock for Golang.
  • go-waitgroupstars35 - Like sync.WaitGroup with error handling and concurrency control.
  • go-workersstars145 - Easily and safely run workers for large data processing pipelines.
  • goccmstars59 - Go Concurrency Manager package limits the number of goroutines that allowed to run concurrently.
  • gohivestars43 - A highly performant and easy to use Goroutine pool for Go.
  • gollbackstars98 - asynchronous simple function utilities, for managing execution of closures and callbacks.
  • gowlstars38 - Gowl is a process management and process monitoring tool at once. An infinite worker pool gives you the ability to control the pool and processes and monitor their status.
  • goworkerstars2.7k - goworker is a Go-based background worker.
  • gowpstars421 - gowp is concurrency limiting goroutine pool.
  • gpoolstars85 - manages a resizeable pool of context-aware goroutines to bound concurrency.
  • grpoolstars716 - Lightweight Goroutine pool.
  • handsstars10 - A process controller used to control the execution and return strategies of multiple goroutines.
  • Hunchstars92 - Hunch provides functions like: All, First, Retry, Waterfall etc., that makes asynchronous flow control more intuitive.
  • kyoostars39 - Provides an unlimited job queue and concurrent worker pools.
  • neilotoole/errgroupstars141 - Drop-in alternative to sync/errgroup, limited to a pool of N worker goroutines.
  • nurserystars52 - Structured concurrency in Go.
  • oversight - Oversight is a complete implementation of the Erlang supervision trees.
  • parallel-fnstars34 - Run functions in parallel.
  • pondstars650 - Minimalistic and High-performance goroutine worker pool written in Go.
  • poolstars698 - Limited consumer goroutine or unlimited goroutine pool for easier goroutine handling and cancellation.
  • queuestars14 - Gives you a sync.WaitGroup like queue group accessibility. Helps you to throttle and limit goroutines, wait for the end of the all goroutines and much more.
  • routinestars54 - go routine control with context, support: Main, Go, Pool and some useful Executors.
  • semaphorestars91 - Semaphore pattern implementation with timeout of lock/unlock operations based on channel and context.
  • semaphorestars153 - Fast resizable semaphore implementation based on CAS (faster than channel-based semaphore implementations).
  • stlstars24 - Software transactional locks based on Software Transactional Memory (STM) concurrency control mechanism.
  • threadpoolstars79 - Golang threadpool implementation.
  • tunnystars3.2k - Goroutine pool for golang.
  • worker-poolstars85 - goworker is a Go simple async worker pool.
  • workerpoolstars936 - Goroutine pool that limits the concurrency of task execution, not the number of tasks queued.

    • GUI

  • appstars6.5k - Package to create apps with GO, HTML and CSS. Supports: MacOS, Windows in progress.
  • fynestars18.5k - Cross platform native GUIs designed for Go based on Material Design. Supports: Linux, macOS, Windows, BSD, iOS and Android.
  • go-astilectronstars4.5k - Build cross platform GUI apps with GO and HTML/JS/CSS (powered by Electron).
  • go-gtk - Go bindings for GTK.
  • go-sciterstars2.5k - Go bindings for Sciter: the Embeddable HTML/CSS/script engine for modern desktop UI development. Cross platform.
  • gotk3stars1.8k - Go bindings for GTK3.
  • gowdstars381 - Rapid and simple desktop UI development with GO, HTML, CSS and NW.js. Cross platform.
  • qtstars9.5k - Qt binding for Go (support for Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS / Sailfish OS / Raspberry Pi).
  • uistars8.2k - Platform-native GUI library for Go. Cross platform.
  • Wails - Mac, Windows, Linux desktop apps with HTML UI using built-in OS HTML renderer.
  • walkstars6.2k - Windows application library kit for Go.
  • webviewstars10.5k - Cross-platform webview window with simple two-way JavaScript bindings (Windows / macOS / Linux).

    • Hardware

  • arduino-clistars3.6k - Official Arduino CLI and library. Can run standalone, or be incorporated into larger Go projects.
  • emgostars990 - Go-like language for programming embedded systems (e.g. STM32 MCU).
  • ghwstars1.2k - Golang hardware discovery/inspection library.
  • go-oscstars160 - Open Sound Control (OSC) bindings for Go.
  • go-rpiostars1.9k - GPIO for Go, doesn't require cgo.
  • goroslibstars226 - Robot Operating System (ROS) library for Go.
  • joystickstars39 - a polled API to read the state of an attached joystick.
  • sysinfostars384 - A pure Go library providing Linux OS / kernel / hardware system information.

    • Images

  • bildstars3.6k - Collection of image processing algorithms in pure Go.
  • bimgstars2.1k - Small package for fast and efficient image processing using libvips.
  • cameronstars93 - An avatar generator for Go.
  • canvasstars1k - Vector graphics to PDF, SVG or rasterized image.
  • darkroomstars199 - An image proxy with changeable storage backends and image processing engines with focus on speed and resiliency.
  • draftstars551 - Generate High Level Microservice Architecture diagrams for GraphViz using simple YAML syntax.
  • geopatternstars1.2k - Create beautiful generative image patterns from a string.
  • ggstars3.6k - 2D rendering in pure Go.
  • giftstars1.6k - Package of image processing filters.
  • gltfstars180 - Efficient and robust glTF 2.0 reader, writer and validator.
  • go-cairostars125 - Go binding for the cairo graphics library.
  • go-gdstars56 - Go binding for GD library.
  • go-nudestars360 - Nudity detection with Go.
  • go-opencvstars1.3k - Go bindings for OpenCV.
  • go-webcolorsstars27 - Port of webcolors library from Python to Go.
  • go-webpstars84 - Library for encode and decode webp pictures, using libwebp.
  • gocvstars5.1k - Go package for computer vision using OpenCV 3.3+.
  • goimagehashstars539 - Go Perceptual image hashing package.
  • goimghdrstars40 - The imghdr module determines the type of image contained in a file for Go.
  • govatarstars522 - Library and CMD tool for generating funny avatars.
  • govipsstars767 - A lightning fast image processing and resizing library for Go.
  • gowitnessstars1.8k - Screenshoting webpages using go and headless chrome on command line.
  • gridderstars55 - A Grid based 2D Graphics library.
  • image2asciistars700 - Convert image to ASCII.
  • imagickstars1.5k - Go binding to ImageMagick's MagickWand C API.
  • imaginarystars4.6k - Fast and simple HTTP microservice for image resizing.
  • imagingstars4.4k - Simple Go image processing package.
  • imgstars144 - Selection of image manipulation tools.
  • lnstars3.1k - 3D line art rendering in Go.
  • mergistars188 - Tool & Go library for image manipulation (Merge, Crop, Resize, Watermark, Animate).
  • mortstars464 - Storage and image processing server written in Go.
  • mpostars10 - Decoder and conversion tool for MPO 3D Photos.
  • picfitstars1.7k - An image resizing server written in Go.
  • ptstars2k - Path tracing engine written in Go.
  • resizestars2.9k - Image resizing for Go with common interpolation methods.
  • rezstars208 - Image resizing in pure Go and SIMD.
  • scoutstars7 - Scout is a standalone open source software solution for DIY video security.
  • smartcropstars1.7k - Finds good crops for arbitrary images and crop sizes.
  • steganographystars159 - Pure Go Library for LSB steganography.
  • stegifystars1k - Go tool for LSB steganography, capable of hiding any file within an image.
  • svgostars1.9k - Go Language Library for SVG generation.
  • tgastars32 - Package tga is a TARGA image format decoder/encoder.
  • webp-serverstars48 - Simple and minimal image server capable of storing, resizing, converting and caching images.

    • IoT (Internet of Things)

  • connectordbstars351 - Open-Source Platform for Quantified Self & IoT.
  • devicesstars256 - Suite of libraries for IoT devices, experimental for x/exp/io.
  • eywastars58 - Project Eywa is essentially a connection manager that keeps track of connected devices.
  • flogostars2.1k - Project Flogo is an Open Source Framework for IoT Edge Apps & Integration.
  • gattstars1k - Gatt is a Go package for building Bluetooth Low Energy peripherals.
  • gobotstars7.9k - Gobot is a framework for robotics, physical computing, and the Internet of Things.
  • huegostars219 - An extensive Philips Hue client library for Go.
  • iotstars62 - IoT is a simple framework for implementing a Google IoT Core device.
  • mainfluxstars1.9k - Industrial IoT Messaging and Device Management Server.
  • periph - Peripherals I/O to interface with low-level board facilities.
  • sensorbeestars214 - Lightweight stream processing engine for IoT.

    • Job Scheduler

  • cheekstars57 - A simple crontab like scheduler that aims to offer a KISS approach to job scheduling.
  • clockwerkstars128 - Go package to schedule periodic jobs using a simple, fluent syntax.
  • crontickerstars7 - A ticker implementation to support cron schedules.
  • go-cronstars214 - Simple Cron library for go that can execute closures or functions at varying intervals, from once a second to once a year on a specific date and time. Primarily for web applications and long running daemons.
  • go-quartzstars953 - Simple, zero-dependency scheduling library for Go.
  • gocronstars2.4k - Easy and fluent Go job scheduling. This is an actively maintained fork of jasonlvhit/gocronstars3.1k.
  • gronstars922 - Define time-based tasks using a simple Go API and Gron’s scheduler will run them accordingly.
  • gronxstars215 - Cron expression parser, task runner and daemon consuming crontab like task list.
  • JobRunnerstars944 - Smart and featureful cron job scheduler with job queuing and live monitoring built in.
  • jobsstars493 - Persistent and flexible background jobs library.
  • leprechaunstars91 - Job scheduler that supports webhooks, crons and classic scheduling.
  • schedstars26 - A job scheduler with the ability to fast-forward time.
  • schedulerstars400 - Cronjobs scheduling made easy.
