  • tasksstars114 - An easy to use in-process scheduler for recurring tasks in Go.

    • JSON

  • ajsonstars132 - Abstract JSON for golang with JSONPath support.
  • askstars19 - Easy access to nested values in maps and slices. Works in combination with encoding/json and other packages that "Unmarshal" arbitrary data into Go data-types.
  • dynjsonstars13 - Client-customizable JSON formats for dynamic APIs.
  • ejstars9 - Write and read JSON from different sources succinctly.
  • epochstars10 - Contains primitives for marshaling/unmarshaling Unix timestamp/epoch to/from build-in time.Time type in JSON.
  • fastjsonstars1.7k - Fast JSON parser and validator for Go. No custom structs, no code generation, no reflection.
  • gjostars112 - Small utility to create JSON objects.
  • GJSONstars11.2k - Get a JSON value with one line of code.
  • go-jsonerrorstars13 - Go-JsonError is ment to allow us to easily create json response errors that follow the JsonApi spec.
  • go-respondstars50 - Go package for handling common HTTP JSON responses.
  • gojqstars184 - JSON query in Golang.
  • gojsonstars2.5k - Automatically generate Go (golang) struct definitions from example JSON.
  • JayDiffstars92 - JSON diff utility written in Go.
  • jettisonstars136 - Fast and flexible JSON encoder for Go.
  • jscanstars15 - High performance zero-allocation JSON iterator.
  • JSON-to-Go - Convert JSON to Go struct.
  • JSON-to-Proto - Convert JSON to Protobuf online.
  • json2gostars107 - Advanced JSON to Go struct conversion. Provides package that can parse multiple JSON documents and create struct to fit them all.
  • jsonapi-errorsstars13 - Go bindings based on the JSON API errors reference.
  • jsoncolorstars28 - Drop-in replacement for encoding/json that outputs colorized JSON.
  • jsondiffstars206 - JSON diff library for Go based on RFC6902 (JSON Patch).
  • jsonfstars64 - Console tool for highlighted formatting and struct query fetching JSON.
  • jsongostars105 - Fluent API to make it easier to create Json objects.
  • jsonhalstars12 - Simple Go package to make custom structs marshal into HAL compatible JSON responses.
  • jsonicstars8 - Utilities to handle and query JSON without defining structs in a type safe manner.
  • jzonstars11 - JSON library with standard compatible API/behavior.
  • kazaamstars241 - API for arbitrary transformation of JSON documents.
  • mapslice-jsonstars14 - Go MapSlice for ordered marshal/ unmarshal of maps in JSON.
  • mpstars46 - Simple cli email parser. It currently takes stdin and outputs JSON.
  • OjGstars518 - Optimized JSON for Go is a high performance parser with a variety of additional JSON tools including JSONPath.
  • omg.jsonparserstars4 - Simple JSON parser with validation by condition via golang struct fields tags.
  • ujsonstars60 - Fast and minimal JSON parser and transformer that works on unstructured JSON.
  • vjsonstars31 - Go package for validating JSON objects with declaring a JSON schema with fluent API.

    • Logging

  • distillogstars30 - distilled levelled logging (think of it as stdlib + log levels).
  • glgstars172 - glg is simple and fast leveled logging library for Go.
  • glostars15 - PHP Monolog inspired logging facility with identical severity levels.
  • glogstars3.2k - Leveled execution logs for Go.
  • go-cronowriterstars50 - Simple writer that rotate log files automatically based on current date and time, like cronolog.
  • go-logstars13 - Simple and configurable Logging in Go, with level, formatters and writers.
  • go-logstars31 - Log lib supports level and multi handlers.
  • go-logstars40 - Log4j implementation in Go.
  • go-loggerstars281 - Simple logger of Go Programs, with level handlers.
  • gologgerstars41 - Simple easy to use log lib for go, logs in Colored Console, Simple Console, File or Elasticsearch.
  • gomolstars19 - Multiple-output, structured logging for Go with extensible logging outputs.
  • gone/log - Fast, extendable, full-featured, std-lib source compatible log library.
  • httprettystars277 - Pretty-prints your regular HTTP requests on your terminal for debugging (similar to http.DumpRequest).
  • journaldstars32 - Go implementation of systemd Journal's native API for logging.
  • kembastars9 - A tiny debug logging tool inspired by debugstars10.4k, great for CLI tools and applications.
  • logstars10 - An O(1) logging system that allows you to connect one log to multiple writers (e.g. stdout, a file and a TCP connection).
  • logstars1.3k - Structured logging package for Go.
  • logstars283 - Simple, configurable and scalable Structured Logging for Go.
  • logstars26 - Structured log interface for Go cleanly separates logging facade from its implementation.
  • log-voyagestars93 - Full-featured logging saas written in golang.
  • log15stars1.1k - Simple, powerful logging for Go.
  • logdumpstars10 - Package for multi-level logging.
  • logexstars40 - Golang log lib, supports tracking and level, wrap by standard log lib.
  • loggerstars157 - Minimalistic logging library for Go.
  • logmaticstars15 - Colorized logger for Golang with dynamic log level configuration.
  • logostars11 - Golang logger to different configurable writers.
  • logrusstars21.4k - Structured logger for Go.
  • logrusiowriterstars14 - io.Writer implementation using logrusstars21.4k logger.
  • logruslystars28 - logrusstars21.4k plug-in to send errors to a Loggly.
  • logurstars177 - An opinionated logger interface and collection of logging best practices with adapters and integrations for well-known libraries (logrusstars21.4k, go-kit log, zapstars17.2k, zerologstars7.1k, etc).
  • logutilsstars331 - Utilities for slightly better logging in Go (Golang) extending the standard logger.
  • logxistars350 - 12-factor app logger that is fast and makes you happy.
  • lumberjackstars3.6k - Simple rolling logger, implements io.WriteCloser.
  • mlogstars28 - Simple logging module for go, with 5 levels, an optional rotating logfile feature and stdout/stderr output.
  • noodlogstars40 - Parametrized JSON logging library which lets you obfuscate sensitive data and marshal any kind of content. No more printed pointers instead of values, nor escape chars for the JSON strings.
  • onelogstars402 - Onelog is a dead simple but very efficient JSON logger. It is the fastest JSON logger out there in all scenarios. Also, it is one of the logger with the lowest allocation.
  • ozzo-logstars121 - High performance logging supporting log severity, categorization, and filtering. Can send filtered log messages to various targets (e.g. console, network, mail).
  • rollingwriterstars249 - RollingWriter is an auto-rotate io.Writer implementation with multi policies to provide log file rotation.
  • seelogstars1.6k - Logging functionality with flexible dispatching, filtering, and formatting.
  • spewstars5.3k - Implements a deep pretty printer for Go data structures to aid in debugging.
  • stdlogstars45 - Stdlog is an object-oriented library providing leveled logging. It is very useful for cron jobs.
  • structy/logstars5 - A simple to use log system, minimalist but with features for debugging and differentiation of messages.
  • tailstars2.4k - Go package striving to emulate the features of the BSD tail program.
  • xlogstars8 - Plugin architecture and flexible log system for Go, with level ctrl, multiple log target and custom log format.
  • xlogstars137 - Structured logger for net/context aware HTTP handlers with flexible dispatching.
  • yellstars1 - Yet another minimalistic logging library.
  • zapstars17.2k - Fast, structured, leveled logging in Go.
  • zerologstars7.1k - Zero-allocation JSON logger.
  • zkits-loggerstars23 - A powerful zero-dependency JSON logger.

    • Machine Learning

  • bayesianstars742 - Naive Bayesian Classification for Golang.
  • CloudForeststars718 - Fast, flexible, multi-threaded ensembles of decision trees for machine learning in pure Go.
  • ddtstars20 - Dynamic decision tree, create trees defining customizable rules.
  • eaoptstars813 - An evolutionary optimization library.
  • evolistars25 - Genetic Algorithm and Particle Swarm Optimization library.
  • fonetstars70 - A Deep Neural Network library written in Go.
  • go-clusterstars35 - Go implementation of the k-modes and k-prototypes clustering algorithms.
  • go-deepstars393 - A feature-rich neural network library in Go.
  • go-fannstars111 - Go bindings for Fast Artificial Neural Networks(FANN) library.
  • go-featureprocessingstars83 - Fast and convenient feature processing for low latency machine learning in Go.
  • go-galibstars193 - Genetic Algorithms library written in Go / golang.
  • go-prstars62 - Pattern recognition package in Go lang.
  • gobrainstars526 - Neural Networks written in go.
  • godiststars35 - Various probability distributions, and associated methods.
  • gogastars169 - Genetic algorithm library for Go.
  • GoLearnstars8.6k - General Machine Learning library for Go.
  • golinearstars45 - liblinear bindings for Go.
  • GoMindstars36 - A simplistic Neural Network Library in Go.
  • gomlstars1.4k - On-line Machine Learning in Go.
  • gonetstars76 - Neural Network for Go.
  • Goptunastars223 - Bayesian optimization framework for black-box functions written in Go. Everything will be optimized.
  • goRecommendstars192 - Recommendation Algorithms library written in Go.
  • gorgoniastars4.7k - graph-based computational library like Theano for Go that provides primitives for building various machine learning and neural network algorithms.
  • gorsestars6.3k - An offline recommender system backend based on collaborative filtering written in Go.
  • goscorestars84 - Go Scoring API for PMML.
  • gosseractstars1.9k - Go package for OCR (Optical Character Recognition), by using Tesseract C++ library.
  • libsvmstars72 - libsvm golang version derived work based on LIBSVM 3.14.
  • m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native Go code with zero dependencies, written in Python with Go language support.
  • neatstars66 - Plug-and-play, parallel Go framework for NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT).
  • neural-gostars64 - Multilayer perceptron network implemented in Go, with training via backpropagation.
  • ocrserverstars531 - A simple OCR API server, seriously easy to be deployed by Docker and Heroku.
  • onnx-gostars430 - Go Interface to Open Neural Network Exchange (ONNX).
  • probabstars18 - Probability distribution functions. Bayesian inference. Written in pure Go.
  • randomforeststars25 - Easy to use Random Forest library for Go.
  • regommendstars300 - Recommendation & collaborative filtering engine.
  • shieldstars152 - Bayesian text classifier with flexible tokenizers and storage backends for Go.
  • tfgostars2.1k - Easy to use Tensorflow bindings: simplifies the usage of the official Tensorflow Go bindings. Define computational graphs in Go, load and execute models trained in Python.
  • Varisstars48 - Golang Neural Network.

    • Messaging

  • amistars24 - Go client to reliable queues based on Redis Cluster Streams.
  • amqpstars553 - Go RabbitMQ Client Library.
  • APNs2stars2.7k - HTTP/2 Apple Push Notification provider for Go — Send push notifications to iOS, tvOS, Safari and OSX apps.
  • Asynqstars4.4k - A simple, reliable, and efficient distributed task queue for Go built on top of Redis.
  • Beaverstars1.4k - A real time messaging server to build a scalable in-app notifications, multiplayer games, chat apps in web and mobile apps.
  • Benthosstars4.8k - A message streaming bridge between a range of protocols.
  • Busstars278 - Minimalist message bus implementation for internal communication.
  • Centrifugostars6.5k - Real-time messaging (Websockets or SockJS) server in Go.
  • Chanifystars931 - A push notification server send message to your iOS devices.
  • Commanderstars61 - A high-level event driven consumer/producer supporting various "dialects" such as Apache Kafka.
  • Confluent Kafka Golang Clientstars3.6k - confluent-kafka-go is Confluent's Golang client for Apache Kafka and the Confluent Platform.
  • dbusstars765 - Native Go bindings for D-Bus.
  • drone-linestars78 - Sending Line notifications using a binary, docker or Drone CI.
  • emitterstars436 - Emits events using Go way, with wildcard, predicates, cancellation possibilities and many other good wins.
  • eventstars48 - Implementation of the pattern observer.
  • EventBusstars1.3k - The lightweight event bus with async compatibility.
  • gaurun-clientstars11 - Gaurun Client written in Go.
  • Gluestars404 - Robust Go and Javascript Socket Library (Alternative to Socket.io).
  • go-mqstars79 - RabbitMQ client with declarative configuration.
  • go-notifystars62 - Native implementation of the freedesktop notification spec.
  • go-nsqstars2.3k - the official Go package for NSQ.
  • go-resstars60 - Package for building REST/real-time services where clients are synchronized seamlessly, using NATS and Resgate.
  • go-socket.iostars4.8k - socket.io library for golang, a realtime application framework.
  • go-vitotrolstars20 - Client library to Viessmann Vitotrol web service.
  • Gollumstars923 - A n:m multiplexer that gathers messages from different sources and broadcasts them to a set of destinations.
  • golongpollstars614 - HTTP longpoll server library that makes web pub-sub simple.
  • gopush-clusterstars2.1k - gopush-cluster is a go push server cluster.
  • gorushstars6.6k - Push notification server using APNs2stars2.7k and google GCMstars104.
  • gosdstars21 - A library for scheduling when to dispatch a message to a channel.
  • gublestars153 - Messaging server using push notifications (Google Firebase Cloud Messaging, Apple Push Notification services, SMS) as well as websockets, a REST API, featuring distributed operation and message-persistence.
  • harestars51 - A user friendly library for sending messages and listening to TCP sockets.
  • hubstars123 - A Message/Event Hub for Go applications, using publish/subscribe pattern with support for alias like rabbitMQ exchanges.
  • jazzstars17 - A simple RabbitMQ abstraction layer for queue administration and publishing and consuming of messages.
  • machinerystars6.5k - Asynchronous task queue/job queue based on distributed message passing.
  • mangosstars557 - Pure go implementation of the Nanomsg ("Scalability Protocols") with transport interoperability.
  • melodystars2.6k - Minimalist framework for dealing with websocket sessions, includes broadcasting and automatic ping/pong handling.
  • Mercurestars3.1k - Server and library to dispatch server-sent updates using the Mercure protocol (built on top of Server-Sent Events).
  • messagebusstars234 - messagebus is a Go simple async message bus, perfect for using as event bus when doing event sourcing, CQRS, DDD.
  • NATS Go Clientstars4.2k - Lightweight and high performance publish-subscribe and distributed queueing messaging system - this is the Go library.
  • nsq-event-busstars75 - A tiny wrapper around NSQ topic and channel.
  • oplogstars113 - Generic oplog/replication system for REST APIs.
  • pubsubstars386 - Simple pubsub package for go.
  • rabbusstars94 - A tiny wrapper over amqp exchanges and queues.
  • rabtapstars225 - RabbitMQ swiss army knife cli app.
  • RapidMQstars65 - RapidMQ is a lightweight and reliable library for managing of the local messages queue.
  • redisqueuestars89 - redisqueue provides a producer and consumer of a queue that uses Redis streams.
  • rmqconnstars20 - RabbitMQ Reconnection. Wrapper over amqp.Connection and amqp.Dial. Allowing to do a reconnection when the connection is broken before forcing the call to the Close () method to be closed.
  • saramastars9.3k - Go library for Apache Kafka.
  • Uniqush-Pushstars1.4k - Redis backed unified push service for server-side notifications to mobile devices.
  • zmq4stars1k - Go interface to ZeroMQ version 4. Also available for version 3stars133 and version 2stars18.

    • Microsoft Office

  • uniofficestars3.6k - Pure go library for creating and processing Office Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx) and Powerpoint (.pptx) documents.

    • Microsoft Office

    Microsoft Excel

  • excelizestars13.1k - Golang library for reading and writing Microsoft Excel™ (XLSX) files.
  • go-excelstars162 - A simple and light reader to read a relate-db-like excel as a table.
  • goxlsxwriterstars19 - Golang bindings for libxlsxwriter for writing XLSX (Microsoft Excel) files.
  • xlsxstars5.4k - Library to simplify reading the XML format used by recent version of Microsoft Excel in Go programs.
  • xlsxstars154 - Fast and safe way to read/update your existing Microsoft Excel files in Go programs.

    • Miscellaneous

    Dependency Injection

  • alicestars50 - Additive dependency injection container for Golang.
  • distars165 - A dependency injection container for go programming language.
  • digstars2.8k - A reflection based dependency injection toolkit for Go.
  • dingostars140 - A dependency injection toolkit for Go, based on Guice.
  • fxstars3.2k - A dependency injection based application framework for Go (built on top of dig).
  • gocontainerstars18 - Simple Dependency Injection Container.
  • goioc/distars213 - Spring-inspired Dependency Injection Container.
  • google/wirestars9.3k - Automated Initialization in Go.
  • HnH/distars6 - DI container library that is focused on clean API and flexibility.
  • kinitstars9 - Customizable dependency injection container with the global mode, cascade initialization and panic-safe finalization.
  • linkerstars36 - A reflection based dependency injection and inversion of control library with components lifecycle support.
  • wirestars37 - Strict Runtime Dependency Injection for Golang.

    • Miscellaneous

    Project Layout

  • ardanlabs/servicestars2.5k - A starter kit for building production grade scalable web service applications.
  • cookiecutter-golangstars549 - A Go application boilerplate template for quick starting projects following production best practices.
  • go-samplestars111 - A sample layout for Go application projects with the real code.
  • go-starterstars259 - An opinionated production-ready RESTful JSON backend template, highly integrated with VSCode DevContainers.
  • go-todo-backendstars175 - Go Todo Backend example using modular project layout for product microservice.
  • gobasestars34 - A simple skeleton for golang application with basic setup for real golang application.
  • golang-standards/project-layoutstars35.2k - Set of common historical and emerging project layout patterns in the Go ecosystem. Note: despite the org-name they do not represent official golang standards, see this issue for more information. Nonetheless, some may find the layout useful.
  • golang-templates/seedstars334 - Go application GitHub repository template.
  • insidieux/iniziostars13 - Golang project layout generator with plugins.
  • modern-go-applicationstars1.3k - Go application boilerplate and example applying modern practices.
  • scaffoldstars126 - Scaffold generates a starter Go project layout. Lets you focus on business logic implemented.
  • wangyoucao577/go-project-layoutstars19 - Set of practices and discussions on how to structure Go project layout.

    • Miscellaneous

    Strings

  • bexpstars12 - Go implementation of Brace Expansion mechanism to generate arbitrary strings.
  • go-formatter - Implements replacement fields surrounded by curly braces {} format strings.
  • gobeam/Stringystars148 - String manipulation library to convert string to camel case, snake case, kebab case / slugify etc.
  • strutilstars187 - String utilities.
  • sttrstars424 - cross-platform, cli app to perform various operations on string.
  • xstringsstars1.1k - Collection of useful string functions ported from other languages.

    • Miscellaneous

    Uncategorized

  • anagentstars15 - Minimalistic, pluggable Golang evloop/timer handler with dependency-injection.
  • antchstars240 - A fast, powerful and extensible web crawling & scraping framework.
  • archiver - Library and command for making and extracting .zip and .tar.gz archives.
  • autoflagsstars38 - Go package to automatically define command line flags from struct fields.
  • avgRatingstars12 - Calculate average score and rating based on Wilson Score Equation.
  • bannerstars409 - Add beautiful banners into your Go applications.
  • base64Captchastars1.6k - Base64captch supports digit, number, alphabet, arithmetic, audio and digit-alphabet captcha.
  • basexxstars3 - Convert to, from, and between digit strings in various number bases.
  • batterystars211 - Cross-platform, normalized battery information library.
  • bitiostars201 - Highly optimized bit-level Reader and Writer for Go.
  • browscap_gostars43 - GoLang Library for Browser Capabilities Project.
  • captchastars121 - Package captcha provides an easy to use, unopinionated API for captcha generation.
  • convstars386 - Package conv provides fast and intuitive conversions across Go types.
  • datacounterstars44 - Go counters for readers/writer/http.ResponseWriter.
  • fakerstars8 - Fake data generator.
  • fakerstars67 - Random fake data and struct generator for Go.
  • ffmtstars280 - Beautify data display for Humans.
  • gatusstars3k - Automated service health dashboard.
  • go-commandbusstars6 - A slight and pluggable command-bus for Go.
  • go-commons-poolstars1.1k - Generic object pool for Golang.
  • go-openapi - Collection of packages to parse and utilize open-api schemas.
  • go-resiliencystars1.6k - Resiliency patterns for golang.
  • go-unarrstars206 - Decompression library for RAR, TAR, ZIP and 7z archives.
  • gofakeitstars2.7k - Random data generator written in go.
  • gommitstars99 - Analyze git commit messages to ensure they follow defined patterns.
  • gopsutilstars8.3k - Cross-platform library for retrieving process and system utilization(CPU, Memory, Disks, etc).
  • goshstars31 - Provide Go Statistics Handler, Struct, Measure Method.
  • gosmsstars1.4k - Your own local SMS gateway in Go that can be used to send SMS.
  • gotopromstars98 - Type-safe metrics builder wrapper library for the official Prometheus client.
  • gountriesstars360 - Package that exposes country and subdivision data.
  • gtreestars73 - Provide CLI and Package for tree output and directories creation from Markdown or programmatically.
  • healthstars623 - A simple and flexible health check library for Go.
  • healthstars436 - Easy to use, extensible health check library.
  • healthcheckstars234 - An opinionated and concurrent health-check HTTP handler for RESTful services.
  • hostutilsstars12 - A golang library for packing and unpacking FQDNs list.
  • indigostars96 - Distributed unique ID generator of using Sonyflake and encoded by Base58.
  • lkstars256 - A simple licensing library for golang.
  • llvmstars965 - Library for interacting with LLVM IR in pure Go.
  • metricsstars24 - Library for metrics instrumentation and Prometheus exposition.
  • morsestars75 - Library to convert to and from morse code.
  • numastars11 - NUMA is a utility library, which is written in go. It help us to write some NUMA-AWARED code.
  • pdfgenstars60 - HTTP service to generate PDF from Json requests.
  • persianstars66 - Some utilities for Persian language in go.
  • sandidstars38 - Every grain of sand on earth has its own ID.
  • shellwordsstars18 - A Golang library to manipulate strings according to the word parsing rules of the UNIX Bourne shell.
  • shortidstars807 - Distributed generation of super short, unique, non-sequential, URL friendly IDs.
  • shoutrrrstars466 - Notification library providing easy access to various messaging services like slack, mattermost, gotify and smtp among others.
  • statelessstars490 - A fluent library for creating state machines.
  • statsstars164 - Monitors Go MemStats + System stats such as Memory, Swap and CPU and sends via UDP anywhere you want for logging etc...
  • turtlestars139 - Emojis for Go.
  • url-shortenerstars38 - A modern, powerful, and robust URL shortener microservice with mysql support.
  • VarHandler - Generate boilerplate http input and output handling.
  • varintstars3 - A faster varying length integer encoder/decoder than the one provided in the standard library.
  • xdgstars29 - FreeDesktop.org (xdg) Specs implemented in Go.
  • xkgstars54 - X Keyboard Grabber.

    • Miscellaneous

    Language Detection

  • detectlanguagestars16 - Language Detection API Go Client. Supports batch requests, short phrase or single word language detection.
  • getlangstars143 - Fast natural language detection package.

    • Miscellaneous

    Morphological Analyzers

  • go-stemstars69 - Implementation of the porter stemming algorithm.
  • go2vecstars49 - Reader and utility functions for word2vec embeddings.
  • golibstemmerstars20 - Go bindings for the snowball libstemmer library including porter 2.
  • gosentiwordnetstars9 - Sentiment analyzer using sentiwordnet lexicon in Go.
  • govaderstars28 - Go implementation of VADER Sentiment Analysisstars3.7k.
  • kagomestars681 - JP morphological analyzer written in pure Go.
  • libtextcatstars12 - Cgo binding for libtextcat C library. Guaranteed compatibility with version 2.2.
  • nlpstars379 - Extract values from strings and fill your structs with nlp.
  • nlpstars377 - Go Natural Language Processing library supporting LSA (Latent Semantic Analysis).
  • paicehuskstars29 - Golang implementation of the Paice/Husk Stemming Algorithm.
  • porterstars11 - This is a fairly straightforward port of Martin Porter's C implementation of the Porter stemming algorithm.
  • porter2stars46 - Really fast Porter 2 stemmer.
  • RAKE.gostars97 - Go port of the Rapid Automatic Keyword Extraction Algorithm (RAKE).

    • Miscellaneous

    Tokenizers

  • segmentstars71 - Go library for performing Unicode Text Segmentation as described in Unicode Standard Annex #29
  • shamojistars13 - The shamoji is word filtering package written in Go.
  • stemmerstars52 - Stemmer packages for Go programming language. Includes English and German stemmers.
  • textcatstars68 - Go package for n-gram based text categorization, with support for utf-8 and raw text.

    • Miscellaneous

    Transliteration

  • transliteratorstars26 - Provides one-way string transliteration with supporting of language-specific transliteration rules.

    • Networking

  • arpstars297 - Package arp implements the ARP protocol, as described in RFC 826.
  • buffstreamsstars251 - Streaming protocolbuffer data over TCP made easy.
  • canopusstars148 - CoAP Client/Server implementation (RFC 7252).
  • cidrangerstars750 - Fast IP to CIDR lookup for Go.
  • dhcp6stars76 - Package dhcp6 implements a DHCPv6 server, as described in RFC 3315.
  • dnsstars6.6k - Go library for working with DNS.
  • dnsmonsterstars209 - Passive DNS Capture/Monitoring Framework.
  • easytcpstars489 - A light-weight TCP framework written in Go (Golang), built with message router. EasyTCP helps you build a TCP server easily fast and less painful.
  • etherstars78 - Cross-platform Go package for sending and receiving ethernet frames.
  • ethernetstars246 - Package ethernet implements marshaling and unmarshaling of IEEE 802.3 Ethernet II frames and IEEE 802.1Q VLAN tags.
  • fasthttpstars18.5k - Package fasthttp is a fast HTTP implementation for Go, up to 10 times faster than net/http.
  • fortiostars2.7k - Load testing library and command line tool, advanced echo server and web UI. Allows to specify a set query-per-second load and record latency histograms and other useful stats and graph them. Tcp, Http, gRPC.
  • ftpstars1k - Package ftp implements a FTP client as described in RFC 959.
  • ftpserverlibstars331 - Fully featured FTP server library.
  • gaiostars466 - High performance async-io networking for Golang in proactor mode.
  • gevstars1.5k - gev is a lightweight, fast non-blocking TCP network library based on Reactor mode.
  • gmqttstars747 - Gmqtt is a flexible, high-performance MQTT broker library that fully implements the MQTT protocol V3.1.1.
  • gnetstars7k - gnet is a high-performance, lightweight, non-blocking, event-driven networking framework written in pure Go.
  • gNxIstars223 - A collection of tools for Network Management that use the gNMI and gNOI protocols.
  • go-getterstars1.4k - Go library for downloading files or directories from various sources using a URL.
  • go-powerdnsstars65 - PowerDNS API bindings for Golang.
  • go-stunstars526 - Go implementation of the STUN client (RFC 3489 and RFC 5389).
  • gobgpstars3k - BGP implemented in the Go Programming Language.
  • gohooksstars22 - GoHooks make it easy to send and consume secured web-hooks from a Go application. Inspired by Spatie's Laravel Webhook Client and Server.
  • golibwiresharkstars26 - Package golibwireshark use libwireshark library to decode pcap file and analyse dissection data.
  • gopacketstars5.1k - Go library for packet processing with libpcap bindings.
  • gopcapstars458 - Go wrapper for libpcap.
  • gosharkstars15 - Package goshark use tshark to decode IP packet and create data struct to analyse packet.
  • gosnmpstars903 - Native Go library for performing SNMP actions.
  • gotcpstars500 - Go package for quickly writing tcp applications.
  • grabstars1.1k - Go package for managing file downloads.
  • gravalstars28 - Experimental FTP server framework.
  • HTTPLabstars3.8k - HTTPLabs let you inspect HTTP requests and forge responses.
  • httpproxystars18 - HTTP proxy handler and dialer.
  • iplibstars94 - Library for working with IP addresses (net.IP, net.IPNet), inspired by python ipaddress and ruby ipaddr
  • jazigostars185 - Jazigo is a tool written in Go for retrieving configuration for multiple network devices.
  • kcp-gostars3.5k - KCP - Fast and Reliable ARQ Protocol.
  • kcptunstars13k - Extremely simple & fast udp tunnel based on KCP protocol.
  • lhttpstars676 - Powerful websocket framework, build your IM server more easily.
  • linkiostars53 - Network link speed simulation for Reader/Writer interfaces.
  • llbstars13 - It's a very simple but quick backend for proxy servers. Can be useful for fast redirection to predefined domain with zero memory allocation and fast response.
  • mdnsstars908 - Simple mDNS (Multicast DNS) client/server library in Golang.
  • mqttPaho - The Paho Go Client provides an MQTT client library for connection to MQTT brokers via TCP, TLS or WebSockets.
  • nbiostars800 - Pure Go 1000k+ connections solution, support tls/http1.x/websocket and basically compatible with net/http, with high-performance and low memory cost, non-blocking, event-driven, easy-to-use.
  • netpollstars3.1k - A high-performance non-blocking I/O networking framework, which focused on RPC scenarios, developed by ByteDance.
  • NFF-Gostars1.3k - Framework for rapid development of performant network functions for cloud and bare-metal (former YANFF).
  • packetstars74 - Send packets over TCP and UDP. It can buffer messages and hot-swap connections if needed.
  • panoptes-streamstars37 - A cloud native distributed streaming network telemetry (gNMI, Juniper JTI and Cisco MDT).
  • peerdiscoverystars560 - Pure Go library for cross-platform local peer discovery using UDP multicast.
  • portproxystars51 - Simple TCP proxy which adds CORS support to API's which don't support it.
  • publicipstars26 - Package publicip returns your public facing IPv4 address (internet egress).
  • quic-gostars7.4k - An implementation of the QUIC protocol in pure Go.
  • rawstars423 - Package raw enables reading and writing data at the device driver level for a network interface.
  • sftpstars1.2k - Package sftp implements the SSH File Transfer Protocol as described in https://filezilla-project.org/specs/draft-ietf-secsh-filexfer-02.txt.
  • sshstars2.7k - Higher-level API for building SSH servers (wraps crypto/ssh).
  • sslbstars143 - It's a Super Simples Load Balancer, just a little project to achieve some kind of performance.
  • stunstars487 - Go implementation of RFC 5389 STUN protocol.
  • tcp_serverstars419 - Go library for building tcp servers faster.
  • tspoolstars14 - A TCP Library use worker pool to improve performance and protect your server.
  • utpstars164 - Go uTP micro transport protocol implementation.
  • vsshstars867 - Go library for building network and server automation over SSH protocol.
  • waterstars1.5k - Simple TUN/TAP library.
  • webrtcstars10.1k - A pure Go implementation of the WebRTC API.
  • winrmstars383 - Go WinRM client to remotely execute commands on Windows machines.
  • xtcpstars135 - TCP Server Framework with simultaneous full duplex communication, graceful shutdown, and custom protocol.

    • Networking

    HTTP Clients

  • gentlemanstars971 - Full-featured plugin-driven HTTP client library.
  • go-http-clientstars42 - Make http calls simply and easily.
  • go-reqstars16 - Declarative golang HTTP client.
  • go-retryablehttpstars1.3k - Retryable HTTP client in Go.
  • grequestsstars1.9k - A Go "clone" of the great and famous Requests library.
  • heimdallstars2.3k - An enhanced http client with retry and hystrix capabilities.
  • httpcstars5 - A customizable and simple HTTP client library. Only depend on the stdlib HTTP client.
  • httpretrystars24 - Enriches the default go HTTP client with retry functionality.
  • pesterstars598 - Go HTTP client calls with retries, backoff, and concurrency.
  • requeststars216 - HTTP client for golang. If you have experience about axios or requests, you will love it. No 3rd dependency.
  • requestsstars424 - HTTP requests for Gophers. Uses context.Context and doesn't hide the underlying net/http.Client, making it compatible with standard Go APIs. Also includes testing tools.
  • restystars6.8k - Simple HTTP and REST client for Go inspired by Ruby rest-client.
  • rqstars42 - A nicer interface for golang stdlib HTTP client.
  • slingstars1.5k - Sling is a Go HTTP client library for creating and sending API requests.

    • OpenGL

  • glstars934 - Go bindings for OpenGL (generated via glow).
  • glfwstars1.3k - Go bindings for GLFW 3.
  • go-glmatrixstars5 - Go port of glMatrix library.
  • goxjs/glstars160 - Go cross-platform OpenGL bindings (OS X, Linux, Windows, browsers, iOS, Android).
  • goxjs/glfwstars77 - Go cross-platform glfw library for creating an OpenGL context and receiving events.
  • mathglstars463 - Pure Go math package specialized for 3D math, with inspiration from GLM.

    • ORM

  • cachemestars22 - Schema based, typed Redis caching/memoize framework for Go.
  • entstars11.8k - An entity framework for Go. Simple, yet powerful ORM for modeling and querying data.
  • go-firestormstars38 - A simple ORM for Google/Firebase Cloud Firestore.
  • go-querysetstars684 - 100% type-safe ORM with code generation and MySQL, PostgreSQL, Sqlite3, SQL Server support based on GORM.
  • go-sqlstars168 - A easy ORM for mysql.
  • go-sqlbuilderstars850 - A flexible and powerful SQL string builder library plus a zero-config ORM.
  • go-storestars109 - Simple and fast Redis backed key-value store library for Go.
  • GORMstars30k - The fantastic ORM library for Golang, aims to be developer friendly.
  • gormtstars2k - Mysql database to golang gorm struct.
  • gorpstars3.6k - Go Relational Persistence, ORM-ish library for Go.
  • grimoirestars158 - Grimoire is a database access layer and validation for golang. (Support: MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite3).
  • lorestars11 - Simple and lightweight pseudo-ORM/pseudo-struct-mapping environment for Go.
  • marlowstars12 - Generated ORM from project structs for compile time safety assurances.
  • pop/sodastars1.2k - Database migration, creation, ORM, etc... for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite.
  • Prismastars1.3k - Prisma Client Go, Typesafe database access for Go.
  • reformstars1.3k - Better ORM for Go, based on non-empty interfaces and code generation.
  • relstars585 - Modern Database Access Layer for Golang - Testable, Extendable and Crafted Into a Clean and Elegant API.
  • SQLBoilerstars5.2k - ORM generator. Generate a featureful and blazing-fast ORM tailored to your database schema.
  • upper.io/dbstars3.2k - Single interface for interacting with different data sources through the use of adapters that wrap mature database drivers.
  • XORM - Simple and powerful ORM for Go. (Support: MySQL, MyMysql, PostgreSQL, Tidb, SQLite3, MsSql and Oracle).
  • Zoomstars294 - Blazing-fast datastore and querying engine built on Redis.

    • Package Management

  • go modules - Modules are the unit of source code interchange and versioning. The go command has direct support for working with modules, including recording and resolving dependencies on other modules.

    • Performance

  • jaegerstars16.5k - A distributed tracing system.
  • pixiestars3.9k - No instrumentation tracing for Golang applications via eBPF.
  • profilestars1.8k - Simple profiling support package for Go.
  • statsvizstars2.4k - Live visualization of your Go application runtime statistics.
  • tracerstars68 - Simple, lightweight tracing.

    • Query Language

  • api-fustars45 - Comprehensive GraphQL implementation.
  • daselstars3.7k - Query and update data structures using selectors from the command line. Comparable to jq/yq but supports JSON, YAML, TOML and XML with zero runtime dependencies.
  • gojsonqstars1.9k - A simple Go package to Query over JSON Data.
  • gqlgenstars8.2k - go generate based graphql server library.
  • graphqlstars57 - graphql parser + utilities.
  • graphqlstars4.3k - GraphQL server with a focus on ease of use.
  • graphql-gostars8.8k - Implementation of GraphQL for Go.
  • gwsstars5 - Apollos' "GraphQL over Websocket" client and server implementation.
  • jsonpathstars11 - A query library for retrieving part of JSON based on JSONPath syntax.
  • jsonqlstars256 - JSON query expression library in Golang.
  • jsonslicestars72 - Jsonpath queries with advanced filters.
  • rqlstars264 - Resource Query Language for REST API.
  • rqpstars45 - Query Parser for REST API. Filtering, validations, both AND, OR operations are supported directly in the query.
  • strafstars34 - Easily Convert Golang structs to GraphQL objects.

    • Resource Embedding

  • debmestars22 - Create an embed.FS from an existing embed.FS subdirectory.
  • escstars627 - Embeds files into Go programs and provides http.FileSystem interfaces to them.
  • fileb0xstars616 - Simple tool to embed files in go with focus on "customization" and ease to use.
  • go-resourcesstars176 - Unfancy resources embedding with Go.
  • go.ricestars2.3k - go.rice is a Go package that makes working with resources such as HTML, JS, CSS, images, and templates very easy.
  • mulestars12 - Embed external resources like images, movies ... into Go source code to create single file binaries using go generate. Focussed on simplicity.
  • packrstars3.4k - The simple and easy way to embed static files into Go binaries.
  • rebedstars23 - Recreate folder structures and files from Go 1.16's embed.FS type
  • staticsstars65 - Embeds static resources into go files for single binary compilation + works with http.FileSystem + symlinks.
  • statikstars3.5k - Embeds static files into a Go executable.
  • templifystars28 - Embed external template files into Go code to create single file binaries.
  • vfsgenstars948 - Generates a vfsdata.go file that statically implements the given virtual filesystem.

    • Science and Data Analysis

  • assocentitystars10 - Package assocentity returns the average distance from words to a given entity.
  • bradleyterrystars7 - Provides a Bradley-Terry Model for pairwise comparisons.
  • calendarheatmapstars363 - Calendar heatmap in plain Go inspired by Github contribution activity.
  • chartstars737 - Simple Chart Plotting library for Go. Supports many graphs types.
  • dataframe-gostars892 - Dataframes for machine-learning and statistics (similar to pandas).
  • decimalstars29 - Package decimal implements arbitrary-precision decimal floating-point arithmetic.
  • evalerstars50 - Simple floating point arithmetic expression evaluator.
  • ewmastars392 - Exponentially-weighted moving averages.
  • geomstars52 - 2D geometry for golang.
  • go-dspstars795 - Digital Signal Processing for Go.
  • go-estimatestars101 - State estimation and filtering algorithms in Go.
  • go-gtstars8 - Graph theory algorithms written in "Go" language.
  • godesimstars20 - Extended/multivariable ODE solver framework for event-based simulations with simple API.
  • goentstars28 - GO Implementation of Entropy Measures.
  • gohistogramstars166 - Approximate histograms for data streams.
  • gonumstars6.1k - Gonum is a set of numeric libraries for the Go programming language. It contains libraries for matrices, statistics, optimization, and more.
  • gonum/plotstars2.3k - gonum/plot provides an API for building and drawing plots in Go.
  • goraphstars697 - Pure Go graph theory library(data structure, algorithm visualization).
  • goslstars1.7k - Go scientific library for linear algebra, FFT, geometry, NURBS, numerical methods, probabilities, optimisation, differential equations, and more.
  • GoStatsstars20 - GoStats is an Open Source GoLang library for math statistics mostly used in Machine Learning domains, it covers most of the Statistical measures functions.
  • graphstars585 - Library of basic graph algorithms.
  • jsonl-graphstars61 - Tool to manipulate JSONL graphs with graphviz support.
  • odestars19 - Ordinary differential equation (ODE) solver which supports extended states and channel-based iteration stop conditions.
  • orbstars584 - 2D geometry types with clipping, GeoJSON and Mapbox Vector Tile support.
  • pagerankstars79 - Weighted PageRank algorithm implemented in Go.
  • piecewiselinearstars23 - Tiny linear interpolation library.
  • PiHexstars18 - Implementation of the "Bailey-Borwein-Plouffe" algorithm for the hexadecimal number Pi.
  • rootfindingstars10 - root-finding algorithms library for finding roots of quadratic functions.
  • sparsestars136 - Go Sparse matrix formats for linear algebra supporting scientific and machine learning applications, compatible with gonum matrix libraries.
  • statsstars2.5k - Statistics package with common functions missing from the Golang standard library.
  • streamtoolsstars1.3k - general purpose, graphical tool for dealing with streams of data.
  • TextRankstars166 - TextRank implementation in Golang with extendable features (summarization, weighting, phrase extraction) and multithreading (goroutine) support.
  • triangolattestars30 - 2D triangulation library. Allows translating lines and polygons (both based on points) to the language of GPUs.

    • Security

  • acmetoolstars1.9k - ACME (Let's Encrypt) client tool with automatic renewal.
  • acrastars1.1k - Network encryption proxy to protect database-based applications from data leaks: strong selective encryption, SQL injections prevention, intrusion detection system.
  • agestars11.8k - A simple, modern and secure encryption tool (and Go library) with small explicit keys, no config options, and UNIX-style composability.
  • argon2-hashingstars19 - light wrapper around Go's argon2 package that closely mirrors with Go's standard library Bcrypt and simple-scrypt package.
  • argon2pwstars89 - Argon2 password hash generation with constant-time password comparison.
  • autocert - Auto provision Let's Encrypt certificates and start a TLS server.
  • BadActorstars312 - In-memory, application-driven jailer built in the spirit of fail2ban.
  • Cameradarstars3.1k - Tool and library to remotely hack RTSP streams from surveillance cameras.
  • certificatesstars24 - An opinionated tool for generating tls certificates.
  • CertMagicstars4.2k - Mature, robust, and powerful ACME client integration for fully-managed TLS certificate issuance and renewal.
  • donglestars285 - A simple, semantic and developer-friendly golang package for encoding&decoding and encryption&decryption.
  • firewalld-reststars325 - A rest application to dynamically update firewalld rules on a linux server.
  • go-generate-passwordstars45 - Password generator that can be used on the cli or as a library.
  • go-htpasswdstars27 - Apache htpasswd Parser for Go.
  • go-password-validatorstars357 - Password validator based on raw cryptographic entropy values.
  • go-yarastars275 - Go Bindings for YARAstars129, the "pattern matching swiss knife for malware researchers (and everyone else)".
  • goArgonPassstars16 - Argon2 password hash and verification designed to be compatible with existing Python and PHP implementations.
  • goSecretBoxPasswordstars52 - A probably paranoid package for securely hashing and encrypting passwords.
  • Interpol - Rule-based data generator for fuzzing and penetration testing.
  • legostars5.6k - Pure Go ACME client library and CLI tool (for use with Let's Encrypt).
  • memguardstars2.2k - A pure Go library for handling sensitive values in memory.
  • naclstars529 - Go implementation of the NaCL set of API's.
  • optimus-gostars322 - ID hashing and Obfuscation using Knuth's Algorithm.
  • passlibstars271 - Futureproof password hashing library.
  • securestars2k - HTTP middleware for Go that facilitates some quick security wins.
  • secureiostars26 - An keyexchanging+authenticating+encrypting wrapper and multiplexer for io.ReadWriteCloser based on XChaCha20-poly1305, ECDH and ED25519.
  • simple-scryptstars182 - Scrypt package with a simple, obvious API and automatic cost calibration built-in.
  • ssh-vaultstars357 - encrypt/decrypt using ssh keys.
  • sslmgrstars16 - SSL certificates made easy with a high level wrapper around acme/autocert.
  • themisstars1.6k - high-level cryptographic library for solving typical data security tasks (secure data storage, secure messaging, zero-knowledge proof authentication), available for 14 languages, best fit for multi-platform apps.

    • Serialization

  • asn1stars52 - Asn.1 BER and DER encoding library for golang.
  • bambamstars65 - generator for Cap'n Proto schemas from go.
  • belstars29 - Generate TypeScript interfaces from Go structs/interfaces. Useful for JSON RPC.
  • binstructstars61 - Golang binary decoder for mapping data into the structure.
  • cborstars497 - Small, safe, and easy CBOR encoding and decoding library.
  • colferstars678 - Code generation for the Colfer binary format.
  • csvutilstars759 - High Performance, idiomatic CSV record encoding and decoding to native Go structures.
  • elasticstars18 - Convert slices, maps or any other unknown value across different types at run-time, no matter what.
  • fixedwidthstars8 - Fixed-width text formatting (UTF-8 supported).
  • fwencoderstars22 - Fixed width file parser (encoding and decoding library) for Go.
  • go-capnprotostars284 - Cap'n Proto library and parser for go.
  • go-codecstars1.7k - High Performance, feature-Rich, idiomatic encode, decode and rpc library for msgpack, cbor and json, with runtime-based OR code-generation support.
  • go-lctreestars4 - Provides a CLI and primitives to serialize and deserialize LeetCode binary trees.
  • gogoprotobufstars5.4k - Protocol Buffers for Go with Gadgets.
  • goprotobufstars8.7k - Go support, in the form of a library and protocol compiler plugin, for Google's protocol buffers.
  • jsoniterstars11.4k - High-performance 100% compatible drop-in replacement of "encoding/json".
  • mapstructurestars6.2k - Go library for decoding generic map values into native Go structures.
  • php_session_decoderstars155 - GoLang library for working with PHP session format and PHP Serialize/Unserialize functions.
  • pletterstars19 - A standard way to wrap a proto message for message brokers.
  • structomapstars137 - Library to easily and dynamically generate maps from static structures.
  • unitpackingstars5 - Library to pack unit vectors into as fewest bytes as possible.

    • Server Applications

  • algernonstars2.1k - HTTP/2 web server with built-in support for Lua, Markdown, GCSS and Amber.
  • Caddystars43.7k - Caddy is an alternative, HTTP/2 web server that's easy to configure and use.
  • consul - Consul is a tool for service discovery, monitoring and configuration.
  • cortex-tenantstars56 - Prometheus remote write proxy that adds add Cortex tenant ID header based on metric labels.
  • devdstars3.3k - Local webserver for developers.
  • discoverystars1.7k - A registry for resilient mid-tier load balancing and failover.
  • dudeldustars138 - A simple SHOUTcast server.
  • Easegressstars4.8k - A cloud native high availability/performance traffic orchestration system with observability and extensibility.
  • etcdstars41.5k - Highly-available key value store for shared configuration and service discovery.
  • Euterpestars437 - Self-hosted music streaming server with built-in web UI and REST API.
  • Fiderstars2.1k - Fider is an open platform to collect and organize customer feedback.
  • Flagrstars2k - Flagr is an open-source feature flagging and A/B testing service.
  • fliptstars1.9k - A self contained feature flag solution written in Go and Vue.js
  • go-feature-flagstars531 - A feature flag solution, with only a YAML file in the backend (S3, GitHub, HTTP, local file ...), no server to install, just add a file in a central system and refer to it.
  • go-proxy-cachestars68 - Simple Reverse Proxy with Caching, written in Go, using Redis.
  • jackalstars1.3k - An XMPP server written in Go.
  • lets-proxy2stars69 - Reverse proxy for handle https with issue certificates in fly from lets-encrypt.
  • miniostars35.7k - Minio is a distributed object storage server.
  • Moxystars8 - Moxy is a simple mocker and proxy application server, you can create mock endpoints as well as proxy requests in case no mock exists for the endpoint.
  • nginx-prometheusstars34 - Nginx log parser and exporter to Prometheus.
  • nsq - A realtime distributed messaging platform.
  • protoxystars26 - A proxy server that converts JSON request bodies to Protocol Buffers.
  • psql-streamerstars43 - Stream database events from PostgreSQL to Kafka.
  • riemann-relaystars2 - Relay to load-balance Riemann events and/or convert them to Carbon.
  • RoadRunnerstars6.8k - High-performance PHP application server, load-balancer and process manager.
  • SFTPGostars4.9k - Fully featured and highly configurable SFTP server with optional FTP/S and WebDAV support. It can serve local filesystem and Cloud Storage backends such as S3 and Google Cloud Storage.
  • simple-jwt-providerstars30 - Simple and lightweight provider which exhibits JWTs, supports login, password-reset (via mail) and user management.
  • Tricksterstars1.8k - HTTP reverse proxy cache and time series accelerator.

    • Stream Processing

  • go-streamsstars1.1k - Go stream processing library.
  • machinestars115 - Go library for writing and generating stream workers with built in metrics and traceability.
  • streamstars68 - Go Stream, like Java 8 Stream: Filter/Map/FlatMap/Peek/Sorted/ForEach/Reduce...

    • Template Engines

  • egostars537 - Lightweight templating language that lets you write templates in Go. Templates are translated into Go and compiled.
  • extemplatestars50 - Tiny wrapper around html/template to allow for easy file-based template inheritance.
  • fasttemplatestars639 - Simple and fast template engine. Substitutes template placeholders up to 10x faster than text/template.
  • gospinstars40 - Article spinning and spintax/spinning syntax engine, useful for A/B, testing pieces of text/articles and creating more natural conversations.
  • goviewstars303 - Goview is a lightweight, minimalist and idiomatic template library based on golang html/template for building Go web application.
  • jetstars959 - Jet template engine.
  • liquidstars176 - Go implementation of Shopify Liquid templates.
  • marotostars779 - A maroto way to create PDFs. Maroto is inspired in Bootstrap and uses gofpdf. Fast and simple.
  • pongo2stars2.4k - Django-like template-engine for Go.
  • quicktemplatestars2.6k - Fast, powerful, yet easy to use template engine. Converts templates into Go code and then compiles it.
  • raymondstars493 - Complete handlebars implementation in Go.
  • Razorstars799 - Razor view engine for Golang.
  • Soystars167 - Closure templates (aka Soy templates) for Go, following the official spec.
  • sprigstars3.2k - Useful template functions for Go templates.
  • tbdstars22 - A really simple way to create text templates with placeholders - exposes extra builtin Git repo metadata.

    • Testing

  • Testing Frameworks
    • apitest - Simple and extensible behavioural testing library for REST based services or HTTP handlers that supports mocking external http calls and rendering of sequence diagrams.
    • assertstars48 - Basic Assertion Library used along side native go testing, with building blocks for custom assertions.
    • badiostars10 - Extensions to Go's testing/iotest package.
    • baloostars741 - Expressive and versatile end-to-end HTTP API testing made easy.
    • bestars21 - The minimalist generic test assertion library.
    • biffstars12 - Bifurcation testing framework, BDD compatible.
    • charlatanstars198 - Tool to generate fake interface implementations for tests.
    • commanderstars204 - Tool for testing cli applications on windows, linux and osx.
    • covergatesstars52 - Self-hosted code coverage report review and management service.
    • cupaloystars232 - Simple snapshot testing addon for your test framework.
    • dbcleanerstars141 - Clean database for testing purpose, inspired by database_cleaner in Ruby.
    • dsunitstars43 - Datastore testing for SQL, NoSQL, structured files.
    • embedded-postgresstars444 - Run a real Postgres database locally on Linux, OSX or Windows as part of another Go application or test.
    • endlystars222 - Declarative end to end functional testing.
    • fixenvstars7 - Fixture manage engine, inspired by pytest fixtures.
    • flutestars17 - HTTP client testing framework.
    • frisbystars274 - REST API testing framework.
    • gherkingenstars50 - BDD boilerplate generator and framework.
    • ginkgo - BDD Testing Framework for Go.
    • gnomockstars951 - integration testing with real dependencies (database, cache, even Kubernetes or AWS) running in Docker, without mocks.
    • go-carpetstars230 - Tool for viewing test coverage in terminal.
    • go-cmpstars3.1k - Package for comparing Go values in tests.
    • go-hitstars141 - Hit is an http integration test framework written in golang.
    • go-mutestingstars556 - Mutation testing for Go source code.
    • go-mysql-test-containerstars2 - Golang MySQL testcontainer to help with MySQL integration testing.
    • go-snapsstars27 - Jest-like snapshot testing in Golang.
    • go-testdeepstars320 - Extremely flexible golang deep comparison, extends the go testing package.
    • go-testpredicatestars5 - Test predicate style assertions library with extensive diagnostics output.
    • go-vcrstars955 - Record and replay your HTTP interactions for fast, deterministic and accurate tests.
    • goblinstars864 - Mocha like testing framework fo Go.
    • gocstars577 - Goc is a comprehensive coverage testing system for The Go Programming Language.
    • gocheck - More advanced testing framework alternative to gotest.
    • GoConveystars7.5k - BDD-style framework with web UI and live reload.
    • gocreststars84 - Composable hamcrest-like matchers for Go assertions.
    • godogstars1.8k - Cucumber BDD framework for Go.
    • gofightstars427 - API Handler Testing for Golang Router framework.
    • gogivenstars14 - YATSPEC-like BDD testing framework for Go.
    • gomatchstars43 - library created for testing JSON against patterns.
    • gomega - Rspec like matcher/assertion library.
    • Gontstars14 - Go network testing toolkit for testing building complex network topologies using Linux namespaces.
    • GoSpecstars114 - BDD-style testing framework for the Go programming language.
    • gospecifystars53 - This provides a BDD syntax for testing your Go code. It should be familiar to anybody who has used libraries such as rspec.
    • gosuitestars12 - Brings lightweight test suites with setup/teardown facilities to testing by leveraging Go1.7's Subtests.
    • gotstars255 - An enjoyable golang test framework.
    • gotest.toolsstars359 - A collection of packages to augment the go testing package and support common patterns.
    • Hamcreststars28 - fluent framework for declarative Matcher objects that, when applied to input values, produce self-describing results.
    • httpexpectstars2k - Concise, declarative, and easy to use end-to-end HTTP and REST API testing.
    • isstars1.5k - Professional lightweight testing mini-framework for Go.
    • jsonassertstars94 - Package for verifying that your JSON payloads are serialized correctly.
    • omg.testingtoolsstars1 - The simple library for change a values of private fields for testing.
    • restitstars56 - Go micro framework to help writing RESTful API integration test.
    • schemastars18 - Quick and easy expression matching for JSON schemas used in requests and responses.
    • stop-and-gostars6 - Testing helper for concurrency.
    • testcasestars101 - Idiomatic testing framework for Behavior Driven Development.
    • testfixturesstars858 - A helper for Rails' like test fixtures to test database applications.
    • Testifystars17.8k - Sacred extension to the standard go testing package.
    • testmd - Convert markdown snippets into testable go code.
    • testsqlstars14 - Generate test data from SQL files before testing and clear it after finished.
    • testzastars401 - Full-featured test framework with nice colorized output.
    • trialstars6 - Quick and easy extendable assertions without introducing much boilerplate.
    • Ttstars5 - Simple and colorful test tools.
    • wsteststars95 - Websocket client for unit-testing a websocket http.Handler.
  • Mock
    • counterfeiterstars726 - Tool for generating self-contained mock objects.
    • genmock - Go mocking system with code generator for building calls of the interface methods.
    • go-localstackstars55 - Tool for using localstack in AWS testing.
    • go-sqlmockstars4.8k - Mock SQL driver for testing database interactions.
    • go-txdbstars484 - Single transaction based database driver mainly for testing purposes.
    • gockstars1.7k - Versatile HTTP mocking made easy.
    • gomockstars8.1k - Mocking framework for the Go programming language.
    • govcrstars131 - HTTP mock for Golang: record and replay HTTP interactions for offline testing.
    • hoverflystars1.9k - HTTP(S) proxy for recording and simulating REST/SOAP APIs with extensible middleware and easy-to-use CLI.
    • httpmockstars1.5k - Easy mocking of HTTP responses from external resources.
    • minimockstars467 - Mock generator for Go interfaces.
    • mockerystars3.9k - Tool to generate Go interfaces.
    • mockhttpstars22 - Mock object for Go http.ResponseWriter.
    • mockitstars10 - Allows functions and method easy mocking, without defining new types; it's similar to Mockito for Java.
    • mooncakestars14 - A simple way to generate mocks for multiple purposes
    • timexstars65 - A test-friendly replacement for the native time package.
  • Fuzzing and delta-debugging/reducing/shrinking.
    • go-fuzzstars4.5k - Randomized testing system.
    • gofuzzstars1.3k - Library for populating go objects with random values.
    • Tavorstars237 - Generic fuzzing and delta-debugging framework.
  • Selenium and browser control tools.
    • cdpstars640 - Type-safe bindings for the Chrome Debugging Protocol that can be used with browsers or other debug targets that implement it.
    • chromedpstars8.3k - a way to drive/test Chrome, Safari, Edge, Android Webviews, and other browsers supporting the Chrome Debugging Protocol.
    • ggrstars287 - a lightweight server that routes and proxies Selenium WebDriver requests to multiple Selenium hubs.
    • playwright-gostars972 - browser automation library to control Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.
    • rodstars2.8k - A Devtools driver to make web automation and scraping easy.
    • selenoidstars2.2k - alternative Selenium hub server that launches browsers within containers.
  • Fail injection
    • failpointstars738 - An implementation of failpoints for Golang.

    • Third-party APIs

  • airtablestars45 - Go client library for the Airtable API.
  • amazon-product-advertising-apistars54 - Go Client Library for Amazon Product Advertising API.
  • anacondastars1.1k - Go client library for the Twitter 1.1 API.
  • appstore-sdk-gostars3 - Unofficial Golang SDK for AppStore Connect API.
  • aws-sdk-gostars7.9k - The official AWS SDK for the Go programming language.
  • bqwriterstars12 - High Level Go Library to write data into Google BigQuery at a high throughout.
  • brewerydbstars19 - Go library for accessing the BreweryDB API.
  • cachetstars91 - Go client library for Cachet (open source status page system).
  • circlecistars65 - Go client library for interacting with CircleCI's API.
  • clarifaistars57 - Go client library for interfacing with the Clarifai API.
  • codeship-gostars19 - Go client library for interacting with Codeship's API v2.
  • coinpaprika-gostars16 - Go client library for interacting with Coinpaprika's API.
  • device-check-gostars16 - Go client library for interacting with iOS DeviceCheck API v1.
  • discordgostars3.4k - Go bindings for the Discord Chat API.
  • ethrpcstars245 - Go bindings for Ethereum JSON RPC API.
  • facebookstars1.1k - Go Library that supports the Facebook Graph API.
  • fcmstars48 - Go library for Firebase Cloud Messaging.
  • gadsstars50 - Google Adwords Unofficial API.
  • gamistars31 - Go library for Asterisk Manager Interface.
  • gcmstars31 - Go library for Google Cloud Messaging.
  • geo-golangstars441 - Go Library to access Google Maps, MapQuest, Nominatim, OpenCage, Bing, Mapbox, and OpenStreetMap geocoding / reverse geocoding APIs.
  • githubstars8.9k - Go library for accessing the GitHub REST API v3.
  • githubqlstars929 - Go library for accessing the GitHub GraphQL API v4.
  • go-atlassianstars55 - Go library for accessing the Atlassian Cloud services (Jira, Jira Service Management, Jira Agile, Confluence, Admin Cloud)
  • go-aws-newsstars15 - Go application and library to fetch what's new from AWS.
  • go-chronosstars7 - Go library for interacting with the Chronos Job Scheduler
  • go-hacknewsstars16 - Tiny Go client for HackerNews API.
  • go-herestars11 - Go client library around the HERE location based APIs.
  • go-imgurstars24 - Go client library for imgur
  • go-jirastars1.2k - Go client library for Atlassian JIRA
  • go-larkstars115 - An easy-to-use unofficial SDK for Feishu and Lark Open Platform.
  • go-marathonstars197 - Go library for interacting with Mesosphere's Marathon PAAS.
  • go-myanimeliststars33 - Go client library for accessing the MyAnimeList API.
  • go-openprojectstars11 - Go client library for interacting with OpenProject API.
  • go-postman-collectionstars54 - Go module to work with Postman Collections (compatible with Insomnia).
  • go-sophosstars11 - Go client library for the Sophos UTM REST API with zero dependencies.
  • go-sptransstars7 - Go client library for the SPTrans Olho Vivo API.
  • go-swagger-uistars6 - Go library containing precompiled Swagger UI for serving swagger json.
  • go-telegraph - Telegraph publishing platform API client.
  • go-trendingstars122 - Go library for accessing trending repositories and developers at Github.
  • go-twitchstars22 - Go client for interacting with the Twitch v3 API.
  • go-twitterstars1.5k - Go client library for the Twitter v1.1 APIs.
  • go-unsplashstars68 - Go client library for the Unsplash.com API.
  • go-xkcdstars47 - Go client for the xkcd API.
  • go-yapla - Go client library for the Yapla v2.0 API.
  • gogtrendsstars70 - Google Trends Unofficial API.
  • golang-tmdbstars58 - Golang wrapper for The Movie Database API v3.
  • golyricsstars39 - Golyrics is a Go library to fetch music lyrics data from the Wikia website.
  • gomalsharestars10 - Go library MalShare API malshare.com
  • GoMusicBrainzstars47 - Go MusicBrainz WS2 client library.
  • googlestars3.2k - Auto-generated Google APIs for Go.
  • google-analyticsstars13 - Simple wrapper for easy google analytics reporting.
  • google-cloudstars3.1k - Google Cloud APIs Go Client Library.
  • google-email-audit-apistars8 - Go client library for Google G Suite Email Audit API.
  • google-play-scraperstars41 - Get data from Google Play Store.
  • gopaapi5stars13 - Go Client Library for Amazon Product Advertising API 5.0.
  • gosipstars85 - Go client library SharePoint API.
  • gostormstars129 - GoStorm is a Go library that implements the communications protocol required to write Storm spouts and Bolts in Go that communicate with the Storm shells.
  • hipchatstars105 - This project implements a golang client library for the Hipchat API.
  • hipchat (xmpp)stars111 - A golang package to communicate with HipChat over XMPP.
  • igdbstars76 - Go client for the Internet Game Database API.
  • jokeapi-gostars19 - Go client for JokeAPI.
  • larkstars237 - Feishu/Lark Open API Go SDK, Support ALL Open API and Event Callback.
  • lastpass-gostars30 - Go client library for the LastPass API.
  • libgoffistars9 - Library adapter toolbox for native libffi integration
  • Mediumstars133 - Golang SDK for Medium's OAuth2 API.
  • megosstars55 - Client library for accessing an Apache Mesos cluster.
  • minio-gostars1.7k - Minio Go Library for Amazon S3 compatible cloud storage.
  • mixpanelstars49 - Mixpanel is a library for tracking events and sending Mixpanel profile updates to Mixpanel from your go applications.
  • patreon-gostars33 - Go library for Patreon API.
  • paypalstars531 - Wrapper for PayPal payment API.
  • playlyfestars2 - The Playlyfe Rest API Go SDK.
  • pushoverstars126 - Go wrapper for the Pushover API.
  • rawg-sdk-gostars8 - Go library for the RAWG Video Games Database API
  • rrdaclientstars9 - Go Library to access statdns.com API, which is in turn RRDA API. DNS Queries over HTTP.
  • shopifystars24 - Go Library to make CRUD request to the Shopify API.
  • simples3stars95 - Simple no frills AWS S3 Library using REST with V4 Signing written in Go.
  • slackstars4.1k - Slack API in Go.
  • smitestars11 - Go package to wraps access to the Smite game API.
  • spotifystars45 - Go Library to access Spotify WEB API.
  • steamstars28 - Go Library to interact with Steam game servers.
  • stripestars1.6k - Go client for the Stripe API.
  • textbeltstars18 - Go client for the textbelt.com txt messaging API.
  • translatestars32 - Go online translation package.
  • Trellostars204 - Go wrapper for the Trello API.
  • TripAdvisorstars2 - Go wrapper for the TripAdvisor API.
  • tumblrstars8 - Go wrapper for the Tumblr v2 API.
  • twitter-scraperstars260 - Scrape the Twitter Frontend API without authentication and limits.
  • uptimerobotstars51 - Go wrapper and command-line client for the Uptime Robot v2 API.
  • vl-gostars2 - Go client library around the VerifID identity verification layer API.
  • webhooksstars780 - Webhook receiver for GitHub and Bitbucket.
  • wit-gostars131 - Go client for wit.ai HTTP API.
  • ynabstars55 - Go wrapper for the YNAB API.
  • zoozstars7 - Go client for the Zooz API.

    • Utilities

  • apmstars160 - Process manager for Golang applications with an HTTP API.
  • backscannerstars39 - A scanner similar to bufio.Scanner, but it reads and returns lines in reverse order, starting at a given position and going backward.
  • beyondstars49 - The Go tool that will drive you to the AOP world!
  • blankstars9 - Verify or remove blanks and whitespace from strings.
  • bleepstars9 - Perform any number of actions on any set of OS signals in Go.
  • boilrstars1.5k - Blazingly fast CLI tool for creating projects from boilerplate templates.
  • changiestars392 - Automated changelog tool for preparing releases with lots of customization options.
  • chylestars146 - Changelog generator using a git repository with multiple configuration possibilities.
  • circuitstars671 - An efficient and feature complete Hystrix like Go implementation of the circuit breaker pattern.
  • circuitbreakerstars1k - Circuit Breakers in Go.
  • clipboardstars279 - 📋 cross-platform clipboard package in Go.
  • clockworkstars415 - A simple fake clock for golang.
  • cmdstars109 - Library for executing shell commands on osx, windows and linux.
  • commandstars14 - Command pattern for Go with thread safe serial and parallel dispatcher.
  • copystars27 - Package for fast copying structs of different types.
  • copy-pastastars50 - Universal multi-workstation clipboard that uses S3 like backend for the storage.
  • create-go-appstars1.5k - A powerful CLI for create a new production-ready project with backend (Golang), frontend (JavaScript, TypeScript) & deploy automation (Ansible, Docker) by running one command.
  • cryptgostars121 - Crytpgo is a TUI based application written purely in Go to monitor and observe cryptocurrency prices in real time!
  • ctopstars13.5k - Top-like interface (e.g. htop) for container metrics.
  • ctxutilstars20 - A collection of utility functions for contexts.
  • cvtstars28 - Easy and safe convert any value to another type.
  • dbtstars49 - A framework for running self-updating signed binaries from a central, trusted repository.
  • Deathstars184 - Managing go application shutdown with signals.
  • Deepcopierstars392 - Simple struct copying for Go.
  • delvestars530 - Go debugger.
  • dlogstars17 - Compile-time controlled logger to make your release smaller without removing debug calls.
  • equalizerstars39 - Quota manager and rate limiter collection for Go.
  • ergostars538 - The management of multiple local services running over different ports made easy.
  • filetypestars1.6k - Small package to infer the file type checking the magic numbers signature.
  • fillerstars17 - small utility to fill structs using "fill" tag.
  • filterstars98 - provide filtering, sanitizing, and conversion of Go data.
  • fzfstars47.5k - Command-line fuzzy finder written in Go.
  • generatestars28 - runs go generate recursively on a specified path or environment variable and can filter by regex.
  • ghokinstars28 - Parallelized formatter with no external dependencies for gherkin (cucumber, behat...).
  • git-time-metricstars911 - Simple, seamless, lightweight time tracking for Git.
  • go-actuatorstars10 - Production ready features for Go based web frameworks.
  • go-astitodostars59 - Parse TODOs in your GO code.
  • go-bind-pluginstars182 - go:generate tool for wrapping symbols exported by golang plugins (1.8 only).
  • go-bsdiffstars135 - Pure Go bsdiff and bspatch libraries and CLI tools.
  • go-clipstars9 - A minimalistic clipboard manager for Mac.
  • go-convertstars17 - Package go-convert enables you to convert a value into another type.
  • go-countriesstars10 - Lightweight lookup over ISO-3166 codes.
  • go-drystars479 - DRY (don't repeat yourself) package for Go.
  • go-funkstars3.9k - Modern Go utility library which provides helpers (map, find, contains, filter, chunk, reverse, ...).
  • go-healthstars91 - Health package simplifies the way you add health check to your services.
  • go-httpheaderstars41 - Go library for encoding structs into Header fields.
  • go-lockstars80 - go-lock is a lock library implementing read-write mutex and read-write trylock without starvation.
  • go-pkgstars7 - A go toolkit.
  • go-problemdetailsstars14 - Go package for working with Problem Details.
  • go-ratestars371 - Timed rate limiter for Go.
  • go-safestars6 - Panic-safe sandbox.
  • go-sitemap-generatorstars183 - XML Sitemap generator written in Go.
  • go-triggerstars228 - Go-lang global event triggerer, Register Events with an id and trigger the event from anywhere from your project.
  • go-typestars15 - Library providing Go types for store/validation and transfer of ISO-4217, ISO-3166, and other types.
  • gobackstars46 - Go simple exponential backoff package.
  • goctxstars3 - Get your context value with high performance.
  • godaemonstars489 - Utility to write daemons.
  • godropboxstars4.1k - Common libraries for writing Go services/applications from Dropbox.
  • gohperstars256 - Various tools/modules help for development.
  • golarmstars49 - Fire alarms with system events.
  • gologstars58 - Easy and lightweight CLI tool to time track your tasks.
  • gopencilsstars438 - Small and simple package to easily consume REST APIs.
  • goplaceholderstars25 - a small golang lib to generate placeholder images.
  • goreadabilitystars68 - Webpage summary extractor using Facebook Open Graph and arc90's readability.
  • goreleaserstars10.8k - Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible.
  • goreporterstars3k - Golang tool that does static analysis, unit testing, code review and generate code quality report.
  • goseaweedfsstars99 - SeaweedFS client library with almost full features.
  • gostrutilsstars38 - Collections of string manipulation and conversion functions.
  • gotenvstars237 - Load environment variables from .env or any io.Reader in Go.
  • govalstars90 - Evaluate arbitrary expressions in Go.
  • gpathstars39 - Library to simplify access struct fields with Go's expression in reflection.
  • groferstars223 - A system and resource monitoring tool written in Golang!
  • gubrakstars417 - Golang utility library with syntactic sugar. It's like lodash, but for golang.
  • handystars69 - Many utilities and helpers like string handlers/formatters and validators.
  • hostctlstars812 - A CLI tool to manage /etc/hosts with easy commands.
  • htcatstars549 - Parallel and Pipelined HTTP GET Utility.
  • hubstars22.1k - wrap git commands with additional functionality to interact with github from the terminal.
  • hystrix-gostars3.8k - Implements Hystrix patterns of programmer-defined fallbacks aka circuit breaker.
  • immortalstars752 - *nix cross-platform (OS agnostic) supervisor.
  • intrinsicstars45 - Use x86 SIMD without writing any assembly code.
  • jumpstars1.4k - Jump helps you navigate faster by learning your habits.
  • koazeestars507 - Library inspired in Lazy evaluation and functional programming that takes the hassle out of working with arrays.
  • lets-gostars5 - Go module that provides common utilities for Cloud Native REST API development. Also contains AWS Specific utilities.
  • limitersstars104 - Rate limiters for distributed applications in Golang with configurable back-ends and distributed locks.
  • lrserverstars122 - LiveReload server for Go.
  • manistars318 - CLI tool to help you manage multiple repositories.
  • mcstars2.3k - Minio Client provides minimal tools to work with Amazon S3 compatible cloud storage and filesystems.
  • mergostars2.2k - Helper to merge structs and maps in Golang. Useful for configuration default values, avoiding messy if-statements.
  • mimemagicstars80 - Pure Go ultra performant MIME sniffing library/utility.
  • mimesnifferstars25 - A MIME type sniffer for Go.
  • mimetypestars852 - Package for MIME type detection based on magic numbers.
  • minifystars3.1k - Fast minifiers for HTML, CSS, JS, XML, JSON and SVG file formats.
  • minquerystars60 - MongoDB / mgo.v2 query that supports efficient pagination (cursors to continue listing documents where we left off).
  • moldovastars162 - Utility for generating random data based on an input template.
  • molestars1.6k - cli app to easily create ssh tunnels.
  • mssqlxstars102 - Database client library, proxy for any master slave, master master structures. Lightweight and auto balancing in mind.
  • multitickstars64 - Multiplexor for aligned tickers.
  • myhttpstars35 - Simple API to make HTTP GET requests with timeout support.
  • netbugstars71 - Easy remote profiling of your services.
  • nfdumpstars7 - Read nfdump netflow files.
  • nostromostars120 - CLI for building powerful aliases.
  • okrunstars16 - go run error steamroller.
  • olafstars4 - Twitter Snowflake implemented in Go.
  • onecachestars130 - Caching library with support for multiple backend stores (Redis, Memcached, filesystem etc).
  • panicparsestars3.2k - Groups similar goroutines and colorizes stack dump.
  • pattern-matchstars188 - Pattern matching libray.
  • pecostars7.1k - Simplistic interactive filtering tool.
  • pgostars72 - Convenient functions for PHP community.
  • pmstars78 - Process (i.e. goroutine) manager with an HTTP API.
  • ptrstars17 - Package that provide functions for simplified creation of pointers from constants of basic types.
  • rclientstars33 - Readable, flexible, simple-to-use client for REST APIs.
  • repeatstars81 - Go implementation of different backoff strategies useful for retrying operations and heartbeating.
  • requeststars419 - Go HTTP Requests for Humans™.
  • rerunstars165 - Recompiling and rerunning go apps when source changes.
  • rest-gostars16 - A package that provide many helpful methods for working with rest api.
  • retrystars328 - The most advanced functional mechanism to perform actions repetitively until successful.
  • retrystars8 - A simple but highly configurable retry package for Go.
  • retrystars58 - Simple and easy retry mechanism package for Go.
  • retrystars12 - A pretty simple library to ensure your work to be done.
  • retry-gostars44 - Retrying made simple and easy for golang.
  • robustlystars154 - Runs functions resiliently, catching and restarting panics.
  • rospostars185 - Simple and reliable ssh tunnels with embedded ssh server in Golang.
  • scanstars308 - Scan golang sql.Rows directly to structs, slices, or primitive types.
  • scanystars727 - Library for scanning data from a database into Go structs and more.
  • servestars281 - A static http server anywhere you need.
  • setstars39 - Performant and flexible struct mapping and loose type conversion.
  • shutdownstars38 - App shutdown hooks for os.Signal handling.
  • silkstars12 - Read silk netflow files.
  • slicestars49 - Type-safe functions for common Go slice operations.
  • sliceconvstars8 - Slice conversion between primitive types.
  • slicerstars40 - Makes working with slices easier.
  • sortystars109 - Fast Concurrent / Parallel Sorting.
  • sqlxstars12.7k - provides a set of extensions on top of the excellent built-in database/sql package.
  • sshmanstars37 - SSH Manager for authorized_keys files on multiple remote servers.
  • statiksstars10 - Fast, zero-configuration, static HTTP filer server.
  • Stormstars1.9k - Simple and powerful toolkit for BoltDB.
  • structsstars21 - Implement simple functions to manipulate structs.
  • throttlestars29 - Throttle is an object that will perform exactly one action per duration.
  • tikstars4 - Simple and easy timing wheel package for Go.
  • tomestars31 - Tome was designed to paginate simple RESTful APIs.
  • toolboxstars183 - Slice, map, multimap, struct, function, data conversion utilities. Service router, macro evaluator, tokenizer.
  • ugostars27 - ugo is slice toolbox with concise syntax for Go.
  • UNISstars70 - Common Architecture™ for String Utilities in Go.
  • usqlstars7.6k - usql is a universal command-line interface for SQL databases.
  • utilstars257 - Collection of useful utility functions. (strings, concurrency, manipulations, ...).
  • wuzzstars10.1k - Interactive cli tool for HTTP inspection.
  • xferspdystars94 - Xferspdy provides binary diff and patch library in golang.

    • UUID

  • goidstars35 - Generate and Parse RFC4122 compliant V4 UUIDs.
  • gouidstars18 - Generate cryptographically secure random string IDs with just one allocation.
  • nanoidstars55 - A tiny and efficient Go unique string ID generator.
  • snostars72 - Compact, sortable and fast unique IDs with embedded metadata.
