  • ulidstars2.9k - Go implementation of ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier).
  • uniq - No hassle safe, fast unique identifiers with commands.
  • uuidstars15 - Generate, encode, and decode UUIDs v1 with fast or cryptographic-quality random node identifier.
  • uuidstars1.2k - Implementation of Universally Unique Identifier (UUID). Supports both creation and parsing of UUIDs. Actively maintained fork of satori uuid.
  • uuidstars3.9k - Go package for UUIDs based on RFC 4122 and DCE 1.1: Authentication and Security Services.
  • wuidstars475 - An extremely fast unique number generator, 10-135 times faster than UUID.
  • xidstars3k - Xid is a globally unique id generator library, ready to be safely used directly in your server code.

    • Validation

  • checkdigitstars95 - Provide check digit algorithms (Luhn, Verhoeff, Damm) and calculators (ISBN, EAN, JAN, UPC, etc.).
  • godystars63 - 🎈 A lightweight struct validator for Go.
  • govalidstars31 - Fast, tag-based validation for structs.
  • govalidatorstars5.5k - Validators and sanitizers for strings, numerics, slices and structs.
  • govalidatorstars1.2k - Validate Golang request data with simple rules. Highly inspired by Laravel's request validation.
  • jiostars70 - jio is a json schema validator similar to joistars19.3k.
  • ozzo-validationstars2.9k - Supports validation of various data types (structs, strings, maps, slices, etc.) with configurable and extensible validation rules specified in usual code constructs instead of struct tags.
  • terraform-validatorstars79 - A norms and conventions validator for Terraform.
  • validatestars793 - Go package for data validation and filtering. support validate Map, Struct, Request(Form, JSON, url.Values, Uploaded Files) data and more features.
  • validatestars77 - This package provides a framework for writing validations for Go applications.
  • validatorstars11.6k - Go Struct and Field validation, including Cross Field, Cross Struct, Map, Slice and Array diving.

    • Version Control

  • froggit-gostars20 - Froggit-Go is a Go library, allowing to perform actions on VCS providers.
  • ghstars79 - Scriptable server and net/http middleware for GitHub Webhooks.
  • git2gostars1.8k - Go bindings for libgit2.
  • githooksstars50 - Per-repo and shared Git hooks with version control and auto update.
  • go-gitstars3.9k - highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.
  • go-vcsstars74 - manipulate and inspect VCS repositories in Go.
  • herculesstars1.8k - gaining advanced insights from Git repository history.
  • hgostars14 - Hgo is a collection of Go packages providing read-access to local Mercurial repositories.

    • Video

  • gmfstars801 - Go bindings for FFmpeg av* libraries.
  • go-astisubstars414 - Manipulate subtitles in GO (.srt, .stl, .ttml, .webvtt, .ssa/.ass, teletext, .smi, etc.).
  • go-astitsstars439 - Parse and demux MPEG Transport Streams (.ts) natively in GO.
  • go-m3u8stars99 - Parser and generator library for Apple m3u8 playlists.
  • go-mpdstars14 - Parser and generator library for MPEG-DASH manifest files.
  • goavstars1.9k - Comprehensive Go bindings for FFmpeg.
  • gortsplibstars306 - Pure Go RTSP server and client library.
  • gststars166 - Go bindings for GStreamer.
  • libgosubsstars20 - Subtitle format support for go. Supports .srt, .ttml, and .ass.
  • libvlc-gostars319 - Go bindings for libvlc 2.X/3.X/4.X (used by the VLC media player).
  • m3u8stars966 - Parser and generator library of M3U8 playlists for Apple HLS.
  • v4lstars70 - Video capture library for Linux, written in Go.

    • Web Frameworks

  • aah - Scalable, performant, rapid development Web framework for Go.
  • Aerostars501 - High-performance web framework for Go, reaches top scores in Lighthouse.
  • Airstars418 - An ideally refined web framework for Go.
  • appystars128 - An opinionated productive web framework that helps scaling business easier.
  • Banjostars20 - Very simple and fast web framework for Go.
  • Buffalo - Bringing the productivity of Rails to Go!
  • Echostars24k - High performance, minimalist Go web framework.
  • Fiberstars22.7k - An Express.js inspired web framework build on Fasthttp.
  • Fireballstars59 - More "natural" feeling web framework.
  • Flamingostars320 - Framework for pluggable web projects. Including a concept for modules and offering features for DI, Configareas, i18n, template engines, graphql, observability, security, events, routing & reverse routing etc.
  • Flamingo Commercestars365 - Providing e-commerce features using clean architecture like DDD and ports and adapters, that you can use to build flexible e-commerce applications.
  • Gearboxstars675 - A web framework written in Go with a focus on high performance and memory optimization.
  • Ginstars63.5k - Gin is a web framework written in Go! It features a martini-like API with much better performance, up to 40 times faster. If you need performance and good productivity.
  • Ginrpcstars238 - Gin parameter automatic binding tool,gin rpc tools.
  • Gizmostars3.7k - Microservice toolkit used by the New York Times.
  • go-json-reststars3.5k - Quick and easy way to setup a RESTful JSON API.
  • go-reststars125 - Small and evil REST framework for Go.
  • Goastars4.9k - Goa provides a holistic approach for developing remote APIs and microservices in Go.
  • goastars47 - goa is just like koajs for golang, it is a flexible, light, high-performance and extensible web framework based on middleware.
  • Golaxstars76 - A non Sinatra fast HTTP framework with support for Google custom methods, deep interceptors, recursion and more.
  • Golfstars259 - Golf is a fast, simple and lightweight micro-web framework for Go. It comes with powerful features and has no dependencies other than the Go Standard Library.
  • Gondolastars310 - The web framework for writing faster sites, faster.
  • gongularstars451 - Fast Go web framework with input mapping/validation and (DI) Dependency Injection.
  • GoTunastars42 - Minimalistic web framework for Go with mux router, middlewares, sessions, templates, embedded views and static files.
  • gowebstars33 - Web framework with routing, websockets, logging, middleware, static file server (optional gzip), and automatic TLS.
  • Goyavestars1.2k - Feature-complete REST API framework aimed at clean code and fast development, with powerful built-in functionalities.
  • hibootstars179 - hiboot is a high performance web application framework with auto configuration and dependency injection support.
  • Macaronstars3.3k - Macaron is a high productive and modular design web framework in Go.
  • mangostars370 - Mango is a modular web-application framework for Go, inspired by Rack, and PEP333.
  • Microservicestars106 - The framework for the creation of microservices, written in Golang.
  • neostars418 - Neo is minimal and fast Go Web Framework with extremely simple API.
  • patronstars98 - Patron is a microservice framework following best cloud practices with a focus on productivity.
  • Resourseastars33 - REST framework for quickly writing resource based services.
  • REST Layer - Framework to build REST/GraphQL API on top of databases with mostly configuration over code.
  • Revelstars12.7k - High-productivity web framework for the Go language.
  • rexstars33 - Rex is a library for modular development built upon gorilla/mux, fully compatible with net/http.
  • rk-bootstars303 - A bootstrapper library for building enterprise go microservice with Gin and gRPC quickly and easily.
  • ruxstars83 - Simple and fast web framework for build golang HTTP applications.
  • tangostars836 - Micro & pluggable web framework for Go.
  • tigertonicstars1k - Go framework for building JSON web services inspired by Dropwizard.
  • uAdminstars209 - Fully featured web framework for Golang, inspired by Django.
  • utronstars2.2k - Lightweight MVC framework for Go(Golang).
  • voxstars79 - A golang web framework for humans, inspired by Koa heavily.
  • WebGostars260 - A micro-framework to build web apps; with handler chaining, middleware and context injection. With standard library compliant HTTP handlers(i.e. http.HandlerFunc).
  • YARFstars66 - Fast micro-framework designed to build REST APIs and web services in a fast and simple way.

    • Web Frameworks

    Actual middlewares

  • client-timingstars21 - An HTTP client for Server-Timing header.
  • CORSstars2.2k - Easily add CORS capabilities to your API.
  • formjsonstars38 - Transparently handle JSON input as a standard form POST.
  • go-faultstars465 - Fault injection middleware for Go.
  • go-server-timingstars841 - Add/parse Server-Timing header.
  • Limiterstars1.6k - Dead simple rate limit middleware for Go.
  • ln-paywall - Go middleware for monetizing APIs on a per-request basis with the Lightning Network (Bitcoin).
  • midstars5 - Miscellaneous HTTP middleware features: idiomatic error return from handlers; receive/respond with JSON data; request tracing; and more.
  • rk-ginstars38 - Middleware for Gin framework with logging, metrics, auth, tracing etc.
  • rk-grpcstars51 - Middleware for gRPC with logging, metrics, auth, tracing etc.
  • Tollboothstars2.3k - Rate limit HTTP request handler.
  • XFFstars93 - Handle X-Forwarded-For header and friends.

    • Web Frameworks

    Libraries for creating HTTP middlewares

  • alicestars2.7k - Painless middleware chaining for Go.
  • catenastars9 - http.Handler wrapper catenation (same API as "chain").
  • chainstars65 - Handler wrapper chaining with scoped data (net/context-based "middleware").
  • go-wrap - Small middlewares package for net/http.
  • goresstars102 - Go package that handles HTML, JSON, XML and etc. responses. Useful for RESTful APIs.
  • interposestars296 - Minimalist net/http middleware for golang.
  • mediarystars81 - add interceptors to http.Client to allow dumping/shaping/tracing/... of requests/responses.
  • muxchainstars210 - Lightweight middleware for net/http.
  • negronistars7.3k - Idiomatic HTTP middleware for Golang.
  • renderstars1.7k - Go package for easily rendering JSON, XML, and HTML template responses.
  • rendererstars246 - Simple, lightweight and faster response (JSON, JSONP, XML, YAML, HTML, File) rendering package for Go.
  • ryestars98 - Tiny Go middleware library (with canned Middlewares) that supports JWT, CORS, Statsd, and Go 1.7 context.
  • statsstars587 - Go middleware that stores various information about your web application.

    • Web Frameworks

    Routers

  • alienstars123 - Lightweight and fast http router from outer space.
  • belltstars55 - A simple Go HTTP router.
  • Bonestars1.3k - Lightning Fast HTTP Multiplexer.
  • Bxogstars105 - Simple and fast HTTP router for Go. It works with routes of varying difficulty, length and nesting. And he knows how to create a URL from the received parameters.
  • chistars12.4k - Small, fast and expressive HTTP router built on net/context.
  • fasthttprouterstars870 - High performance router forked from httprouter. The first router fit for fasthttp.
  • FastRouterstars22 - a fast, flexible HTTP router written in Go.
  • gocraft/webstars1.5k - Mux and middleware package in Go.
  • Gojistars911 - Goji is a minimalistic and flexible HTTP request multiplexer with support for net/context.
  • goroutestars8 - Simple yet powerful HTTP request multiplexer.
  • GoRouterstars136 - GoRouter is a Server/API micro framework, HTTP request router, multiplexer, mux that provides request router with middleware supporting net/context.
  • gowww/routerstars165 - Lightning fast HTTP router fully compatible with the net/http.Handler interface.
  • httprouterstars14.5k - High performance router. Use this and the standard http handlers to form a very high performance web framework.
  • httptreemuxstars561 - High-speed, flexible tree-based HTTP router for Go. Inspiration from httprouter.
  • larsstars390 - Is a lightweight, fast and extensible zero allocation HTTP router for Go used to create customizable frameworks.
  • muxstars17.5k - Powerful URL router and dispatcher for golang.
  • ngamuxstars52 - Simple HTTP router for Go.
  • ozzo-routingstars441 - An extremely fast Go (golang) HTTP router that supports regular expression route matching. Comes with full support for building RESTful APIs.
  • purestars130 - Is a lightweight HTTP router that sticks to the std "net/http" implementation.
  • Siestastars353 - Composable framework to write middleware and handlers.
  • vestigostars269 - Performant, stand-alone, HTTP compliant URL Router for go web applications.
  • violetearstars105 - Go HTTP router.
  • xmuxstars95 - High performance muxer based on httprouter with net/context support.
  • xujiajun/gorouterstars529 - A simple and fast HTTP router for Go.

    • WebAssembly

  • domstars463 - DOM library.
  • go-canvasstars177 - Library to use HTML5 Canvas, with all drawing within go code.
  • tinygostars11.7k - Go compiler for small places. Microcontrollers, WebAssembly, and command-line tools. Based on LLVM.
  • vertstars77 - Interop between Go and JS values.
  • wasmbrowserteststars132 - Run Go WASM tests in your browser.
  • webapistars121 - Bindings for DOM and HTML generated from WebIDL.

    • Windows

  • d3d9stars133 - Go bindings for Direct3D9.
  • go-olestars912 - Win32 OLE implementation for golang.
  • gosddlstars9 - Converter from SDDL-string to user-friendly JSON. SDDL consist of four part: Owner, Primary Group, DACL, SACL.

    • XML

  • XML-Compstars18 - Simple command line XML comparer that generates diffs of folders, files and tags.
  • xml2mapstars43 - XML to MAP converter written Golang.
  • xmlwriterstars22 - Procedural XML generation API based on libxml2's xmlwriter module.
  • xpathstars516 - XPath package for Go.
  • xquerystars156 - XQuery lets you extract data from HTML/XML documents using XPath expression.
  • zekstars602 - Generate a Go struct from XML.

    • Zero Trust

  • Cosignstars2.6k - Container Signing, Verification and Storage in an OCI registry.
  • in-totostars66 - Go implementation of the in-toto (provides a framework to protect the integrity of the software supply chain) python reference implementation.
  • Spiffe-Vaultstars44 - Utilizes Spiffe JWT authentication with Hashicorp Vault for secretless authentication.
  • Spirestars1.3k - SPIRE (the SPIFFE Runtime Environment) is a toolchain of APIs for establishing trust between software systems across a wide variety of hosting platforms.

    • Code Analysis

  • apicompatstars176 - Checks recent changes to a Go project for backwards incompatible changes.
  • ChainJackingstars29 - Find which of your Go lang direct GitHub dependencies is susceptible to ChainJacking attack.
  • duplstars298 - Tool for code clone detection.
  • errcheckstars1.9k - Errcheck is a program for checking for unchecked errors in Go programs.
  • gcvisstars1.1k - Visualise Go program GC trace data in real time.
  • go-checkstylestars122 - checkstyle is a style check tool like java checkstyle. This tool inspired by java checkstyle, golint. The style referred to some points in Go Code Review Comments.
  • go-cleanarchstars626 - go-cleanarch was created to validate Clean Architecture rules, like a The Dependency Rule and interaction between packages in your Go projects.
  • go-criticstars1.4k - source code linter that brings checks that are currently not implemented in other linters.
  • go-mod-outdatedstars602 - An easy way to find outdated dependencies of your Go projects.
  • go-outdatedstars44 - Console application that displays outdated packages.
  • goast-viewerstars661 - Web based Golang AST visualizer.
  • GoCover.io - GoCover.io offers the code coverage of any golang package as a service.
  • goimports - Tool to fix (add, remove) your Go imports automatically.
  • golang-ifood-sdkstars10 - iFood API SDK.
  • golinesstars481 - Formatter that automatically shortens long lines in Go code.
  • GoLintstars4k - Golint is a linter for Go source code.
  • GoPlantUMLstars1.1k - Library and CLI that generates text plantump class diagram containing information about structures and interfaces with the relationship among them.
  • goreturns - Adds zero-value return statements to match the func return types.
  • gosimple - gosimple is a linter for Go source code that specialises on simplifying code.
  • gostatusstars243 - Command line tool, shows the status of repositories that contain Go packages.
  • lintstars67 - Run linters as part of go test.
  • php-parserstars894 - A Parser for PHP written in Go.
  • staticcheck - staticcheck is go vet on steroids, applying a ton of static analysis checks you might be used to from tools like ReSharper for C#.
  • tarpstars15 - tarp finds functions and methods without direct unit tests in Go source code.
  • tickgitstars283 - CLI and go package for surfacing code comment TODOs (in any language) and applying a git blameto identify the author.
  • todocheckstars391 - Static code analyser which links TODO comments in code with issues in your issue tracker.
  • unconvertstars339 - Remove unnecessary type conversions from Go source.
  • unused - unused checks Go code for unused constants, variables, functions and types.
  • validatestars60 - Automatically validates struct fields with tags.

    • Editor Plugins

  • coc-go language server extension for Vim/Neovimstars493 - This plugin adds gopls features to Vim/Neovim.
  • Go Docstars5 - A Visual Studio Code extension for showing definition in output and generating go doc.
  • Go plugin for JetBrains IDEs - Go plugin for JetBrains IDEs.
  • go-language-serverstars32 - A wrapper to turn the VSCode go extension into a language server supporting the language-server-protocol.
  • go-modestars1.3k - Go mode for GNU/Emacs.
  • go-plusstars1.5k - Go (Golang) Package For Atom That Adds Autocomplete, Formatting, Syntax Checking, Linting and Vetting.
  • gocodestars5k - Autocompletion daemon for the Go programming language.
  • goimports-reviserstars208 - Formatting tool for imports.
  • goprofiling - This extension adds benchmark profiling support for the Go language to VS Code.
  • GoSublimestars3.4k - Golang plugin collection for the text editor SublimeText 3 providing code completion and other IDE-like features.
  • gounit-vimstars24 - Vim plugin for generating Go tests based on the function's or method's signature.
  • theia-go-extensionstars17 - Go language support for the Theia IDE.
  • vim-compiler-gostars88 - Vim plugin to highlight syntax errors on save.
  • vim-gostars15k - Go development plugin for Vim.
  • vscode-gostars3k - Extension for Visual Studio Code (VS Code) which provides support for the Go language.
  • Watchstars197 - Runs a command in an acme win on file changes.

    • Go Generate Tools

  • genericstars44 - flexible data type for Go.
  • gennystars1.7k - Elegant generics for Go.
  • gocontractsstars88 - brings design-by-contract to Go by synchronizing the code with the documentation.
  • godalstars14 - Generate orm models corresponding to golang by specifying sql ddl file, which can be used by gorm.
  • gonericsstars116 - Idiomatic Generics in Go.
  • gotestsstars4.2k - Generate Go tests from your source code.
  • gounitstars64 - Generate Go tests using your own templates.
  • hasgostars121 - Generate Haskell inspired functions for your slices.
  • re2dfastars195 - Transform regular expressions into finite state machines and output Go source code.
  • TOML-to-Go - Translates TOML into a Go type in the browser instantly.
  • xgenstars188 - XSD (XML Schema Definition) parser and Go/C/Java/Rust/TypeScript code generator.

    • Go Tools

  • colorgostars111 - Wrapper around go command for colorized go build output.
  • depthstars791 - Visualize dependency trees of any package by analyzing imports.
  • docsstars14 - Automatically generate RESTful API documentation for GO projects - aligned with Open API Specification standard.
  • generator-go-langstars25 - A Yeoman generator to get new Go projects started.
  • go-callvisstars4.4k - Visualize call graph of your Go program using dot format.
  • go-jamesstars56 - Go project skeleton creator, builds and tests your projects without the manual setup.
  • go-pkg-completestars41 - Bash completion for go and wgo.
  • go-swaggerstars8.1k - Swagger 2.0 implementation for go. Swagger is a simple yet powerful representation of your RESTful API.
  • godbgstars186 - Implementation of Rusts dbg! macro for quick and easy debugging during development.
  • gomodrunstars24 - Go tool that executes and caches binaries included in go.mod files.
  • gothanksstars115 - GoThanks automatically stars your go.mod github dependencies, sending this way some love to their maintainers.
  • igostars55 - An igo to go transpiler (new language features for Go language!)
  • modverstars3 - Compare two versions of a Go module to check the version-number change required (major, minor, or patchlevel), according to semver rules.
  • OctoLinkerstars5.1k - Navigate through go files efficiently with the OctoLinker browser extension for GitHub.
  • richgostars736 - Enrich go test outputs with text decorations.
  • roumonstars121 - Monitor current state of all active goroutines via a command line interface.
  • rtsstars235 - RTS: response to struct. Generates Go structs from server responses.
  • typexstars152 - Examine Go types and their transitive dependencies, alternatively export results as TypeScript value objects (or types) declaration.

    • Go Tools

    DevOps Tools

  • aptlystars6 - aptly is a Debian repository management tool.
  • aurorastars568 - Cross-platform web-based Beanstalkd queue server console.
  • awsenvstars30 - Small binary that loads Amazon (AWS) environment variables for a profile.
  • Balerterstars278 - A self-hosted script-based alerting manager.
  • Blaststars210 - A simple tool for API load testing and batch jobs.
  • bombardierstars3.8k - Fast cross-platform HTTP benchmarking tool.
  • bosunstars3.3k - Time Series Alerting Framework.
  • cassowarystars619 - Modern cross-platform HTTP load-testing tool written in Go.
  • Ddosifystars5k - High-performance load testing tool, written in Golang.
  • DepChargestars23 - Helps orchestrating the execution of commands across the many dependencies in larger projects.
  • docker-go-mingwstars34 - Docker image for building Go binaries for Windows with MinGW toolchain.
  • Dockerfile-Generatorstars137 - A go library and an executable that produces valid Dockerfiles using various input channels.
  • dogostars252 - Monitoring changes in the source file and automatically compile and run (restart).
  • drone-jenkinsstars35 - Trigger downstream Jenkins jobs using a binary, docker or Drone CI.
  • drone-scpstars111 - Copy files and artifacts via SSH using a binary, docker or Drone CI.
  • Dropshipstars62 - Tool for deploying code via cdn.
  • easyssh-proxystars262 - Golang package for easy remote execution through SSH and SCP downloading via ProxyCommand.
  • facstars1.8k - Command-line user interface to fix git merge conflicts.
  • gaiastars4.8k - Build powerful pipelines in any programming language.
  • ghorgstars1.1k - Quickly clone an entire org/users repositories into one directory - Supports GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, and Bitbucket.
  • Giteastars32.7k - Fork of Gogs, entirely community driven.
  • gitea-github-migrator - Migrate all your GitHub repositories, issues, milestones and labels to your Gitea instance.
  • go-furnacestars93 - Hosting solution written in Go. Deploy your Application with ease on AWS, GCP or DigitalOcean.
  • go-selfupdatestars1.1k - Enable your Go applications to self update.
  • gobrewstars192 - gobrew lets you easily switch between multiple versions of go.
  • godbgstars226 - Web-based gdb front-end application.
  • Gogs - A Self Hosted Git Service in the Go Programming Language.
  • gonativestars333 - Tool which creates a build of Go that can cross compile to all platforms while still using the Cgo-enabled versions of the stdlib packages.
  • govvvstars530 - “go build” wrapper to easily add version information into Go binaries.
  • goxstars4.4k - Dead simple, no frills Go cross compile tool.
  • goxcstars1.7k - build tool for Go, with a focus on cross-compiling and packaging.
  • grapesstars158 - Lightweight tool designed to distribute commands over ssh with ease.
  • GVMstars7.9k - GVM provides an interface to manage Go versions.
  • Heystars14.4k - Hey is a tiny program that sends some load to a web application.
  • httprefstars25 - httpref is a handy CLI reference for HTTP methods, status codes, headers, and TCP and UDP ports.
  • jclistars338 - Jenkins CLI allows you manage your Jenkins as an easy way.
  • kalastars1.9k - Simplistic, modern, and performant job scheduler.
  • kclistars187 - Command line tool for inspecting kafka topics/partitions/messages.
  • koolstars614 - Command line tool for managing Docker environments as an easy way.
  • kubernetesstars92.9k - Container Cluster Manager from Google.
  • kwatchstars683 - Monitor & detect crashes in your Kubernetes(K8s) cluster instantly.
  • lstagsstars296 - Tool and API to sync Docker images across different registries.
  • lwcstars27 - A live-updating version of the UNIX wc command.
  • mansshstars272 - manssh is a command line tool for managing your ssh alias config easily.
  • Mobystars64.2k - Collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems.
  • Morastars307 - REST server for accessing MongoDB documents and meta data.
  • ostentstars175 - collects and displays system metrics and optionally relays to Graphite and/or InfluxDB.
  • Packerstars14k - Packer is a tool for creating identical machine images for multiple platforms from a single source configuration.
  • Pewpewstars359 - Flexible HTTP command line stress tester.
  • Pomeriumstars3.3k - Pomerium is an identity-aware access proxy.
  • Rodentstars33 - Rodent helps you manage Go versions, projects and track dependencies.
  • s3-proxystars133 - S3 Proxy with GET, PUT and DELETE methods and authentication (OpenID Connect and Basic Auth).
  • s3gof3rstars1.1k - Small utility/library optimized for high speed transfer of large objects into and out of Amazon S3.
  • s5cmdstars1.3k - Blazing fast S3 and local filesystem execution tool.
  • Scaleway-clistars778 - Manage BareMetal Servers from Command Line (as easily as with Docker).
  • scriptstars3k - Making it easy to write shell-like scripts in Go for DevOps and system administration tasks.
  • sgstars8 - Benchmarks a set of HTTP endpoints (like ab), with possibility to use the response code and data between each call for specific server stress based on its previous response.
  • skmstars831 - SKM is a simple and powerful SSH Keys Manager, it helps you to manage your multiple SSH keys easily!
  • StatusOKstars1.6k - Monitor your Website and REST APIs.Get Notified through Slack, E-mail when your server is down or response time is more than expected.
  • terraform-provider-openapistars219 - Terraform provider plugin that dynamically configures itself at runtime based on an OpenAPI document (formerly known as swagger file) containing the definitions of the APIs exposed.
  • traefikstars40k - Reverse proxy and load balancer with support for multiple backends.
  • trubkastars327 - A CLI tool to manage and troubleshoot Apache Kafka clusters with the ability of generically publishing/consuming protocol buffer and plain text events to/from Kafka.
  • uTaskstars744 - Automation engine that models and executes business processes declared in yaml.
  • Vegetastars20.3k - HTTP load testing tool and library. It's over 9000!
  • webhookstars8.3k - Tool which allows user to create HTTP endpoints (hooks) that execute commands on the server.
  • Wide - Web-based IDE for Teams using Golang.
  • winrm-clistars144 - Cli tool to remotely execute commands on Windows machines.

    • Go Tools

    Other Software

  • Better Go Playground - Go playground with syntax highlight, code completion and other features.
  • blockystars1.9k - Fast and lightweight DNS proxy as ad-blocker for local network with many features.
  • borgstars1.6k - Terminal based search engine for bash snippets.
  • boxedstars78 - Dropbox based blog engine.
  • Cherrystars283 - Tiny webchat server in Go.
  • Circuitstars2k - Circuit is a programmable platform-as-a-service (PaaS) and/or Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS), for management, discovery, synchronization and orchestration of services and hosts comprising cloud applications.
  • Comcaststars9.7k - Simulate bad network connections.
  • confdstars7.9k - Manage local application configuration files using templates and data from etcd or consul.
  • crawleystars92 - Web scraper/crawler for cli.
  • crocstars20.9k - Easily and securely send files or folders from one computer to another.
  • Docker - Open platform for distributed applications for developers and sysadmins.
  • Documizestars1.7k - Modern wiki software that integrates data from SaaS tools.
  • dpstars86 - Through SDK for data exchange with blockchain, developers can get easy access to DAPP development.
  • drivestars6.5k - Google Drive client for the commandline.
  • Duplicacystars4.3k - A cross-platform network and cloud backup tool based on the idea of lock-free deduplication.
  • Gebugstars611 - A tool that makes debugging of Dockerized Go applications super easy by enabling Debugger and Hot-Reload features, seamlessly.
  • gfilestars683 - Securely transfer files between two computers, without any third party, over WebRTC.
  • Go Package Storestars889 - App that displays updates for the Go packages in your GOPATH.
  • go-peerflixstars454 - Video streaming torrent client.
  • GoBoystars2.5k - Nintendo Game Boy Color emulator written in Go.
  • goccstars540 - Gocc is a compiler kit for Go written in Go.
  • GoDocTooltipstars13 - Chrome extension for Go Doc sites, which shows function description as tooltip at function list.
  • GoLand - Full featured cross-platform Go IDE.
  • Gorstars16.2k - Http traffic replication tool, for replaying traffic from production to stage/dev environments in real-time.
  • Guorastars610 - A self-hosted Quora like web application written in Go.
  • hooflistars4 - Generate PlantUML diagrams from Chrome or Firefox network inspections.
  • hugo - Fast and Modern Static Website Engine.
  • idestars354 - Browser accessible IDE. Designed for Go with Go.
  • ipestars358 - Open source Pusher server implementation compatible with Pusher client libraries written in GO.
  • joincapstars177 - Command-line utility for merging multiple pcap files together.
  • Juju - Cloud-agnostic service deployment and orchestration - supports EC2, Azure, Openstack, MAAS and more.
  • Leapsstars730 - Pair programming service using Operational Transforms.
  • lgostars2.3k - Interactive Go programming with Jupyter. It supports code completion, code inspection and 100% Go compatibility.
  • limetext - Lime Text is a powerful and elegant text editor primarily developed in Go that aims to be a Free and open-source software successor to Sublime Text.
  • LiteIDEstars7k - LiteIDE is a simple, open source, cross-platform Go IDE.
  • mockingjaystars522 - Fake HTTP servers and consumer driven contracts from one configuration file. You can also make the server randomly misbehave to help do more realistic performance tests.
  • myLGstars2.6k - Command Line Network Diagnostic tool written in Go.
  • naclpipestars23 - Simple NaCL EC25519 based crypto pipe tool written in Go.
  • Neo-cowsaystars230 - 🐮 cowsay is reborn. for a New Era.
  • nesstars5.1k - Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) emulator written in Go.
  • Orbitstars172 - A simple tool for running commands and generating files from templates.
  • pegstars874 - Peg, Parsing Expression Grammar, is an implementation of a Packrat parser generator.
  • Plikstars1.1k - Plik is a temporary file upload system (Wetransfer like) in Go.
  • protoncheckstars4 - ProtonMail module for waybar/polybar/yabar/i3blocks.
  • resticstars18.2k - De-duplicating backup program.
  • sccstars3.9k - Sloc Cloc and Code, a very fast accurate code counter with complexity calculations and COCOMO estimates.
  • Seaweed File Systemstars15.6k - Fast, Simple and Scalable Distributed File System with O(1) disk seek.
  • shell2httpstars992 - Executing shell commands via http server (for prototyping or remote control).
  • snapstars1.8k - Powerful telemetry framework.
  • Snitchstars16 - Simple way to notify your team and many tools when someone has deployed any application via Tsuru.
  • Stack Upstars2.4k - Stack Up, a super simple deployment tool - just Unix - think of it like 'make' for a network of servers.
  • syncthing - Open, decentralized file synchronization tool and protocol.
  • tcpdogstars207 - eBPF based TCP observability.
  • tcpprobestars329 - TCP tool for network performance and path monitoring, including socket statistics.
  • term-quizstars23 - Quizzes for your terminal.
  • toxiproxystars8.6k - Proxy to simulate network and system conditions for automated tests.
  • tsuru - Extensible and open source Platform as a Service software.
  • vakustars139 - CLI & API for folder-based functions in Vault like copy, move, and search.
  • vFlowstars926 - High-performance, scalable and reliable IPFIX, sFlow and Netflow collector.
  • wellingtonstars299 - Sass project management tool, extends the language with sprite functions (like Compass).
  • wokestars352 - Detect non-inclusive language in your source code.

    • Benchmarks

  • autobenchstars94 - Framework to compare the performance between different Go versions.
  • go-benchmark-appstars24 - Powerful HTTP-benchmark tool mixed with Аb, Wrk, Siege tools. Gathering statistics and various parameters for benchmarks and comparison results.
  • go-benchmarksstars146 - Few miscellaneous Go microbenchmarks. Compare some language features to alternative approaches.
  • go-http-routing-benchmarkstars1.6k - Go HTTP request router benchmark and comparison.
  • go-json-benchmarkstars7 - Go JSON benchmark.
  • go-ml-benchmarksstars24 - benchmarks for machine learning inference in Go.
  • go-web-framework-benchmarkstars1.8k - Go web framework benchmark.
  • go_serialization_benchmarksstars1.4k - Benchmarks of Go serialization methods.
  • gocostmodelstars58 - Benchmarks of common basic operations for the Go language.
  • golang-sql-benchmarkstars61 - Collection of benchmarks for popular Go database/SQL utilities.
  • gospeedstars110 - Go micro-benchmarks for calculating the speed of language constructs.
  • kvbenchstars25 - Key/Value database benchmark.
  • skynetstars1k - Skynet 1M threads microbenchmark.
  • speedtest-resizestars223 - Compare various Image resize algorithms for the Go language.

    • E-Books

    E-books for purchase

  • The Power of Go: Tools - A guide to writing command-line tools in Go.
  • Writing A Compiler In Go
  • Writing An Interpreter In Go - Book that introduces dozens of techniques for writing idiomatic, expressive, and efficient Go code that avoids common pitfalls.

    Tutorials

  • 50 Shades of Go - Traps, Gotchas, and Common Mistakes for New Golang Devs.

  • Build web application with Golangstars41k - Golang ebook intro how to build a web app with golang.
  • Building and Testing a REST API in Go with Gorilla Mux and PostgreSQL - We’ll write an API with the help of the powerful Gorilla Mux.
  • Building Go Web Applications and Microservices Using Gin - Get familiar with Gin and find out how it can help you reduce boilerplate code and build a request handling pipeline.

  • Canceling MySQL - How to cancel MySQL queries.

  • Go By Example - Hands-on introduction to Go using annotated example programs.

  • GopherSnippets - Code snippets with tests and testable examples for the Go programming language.

  • Hackr.io - Learn Go from the best online golang tutorials submitted & voted by the golang programming community.
  • How to Benchmark: dbq vs sqlx vs GORM - Learn how to benchmark in Go. As a case-study, we will benchmark dbq, sqlx and GORM.
  • How To Deploy a Go Web Application with Docker - Learn how to use Docker for Go development and how to build production Docker images.
  • How to Use Godog for Behavior-driven Development in Go - Get started with Godog — a Behavior-driven development framework for building and testing Go applications.
